fields.shortDescription: Akaar is a solo singing contest for regional music. After online prelims, finalists perform live for five minutes. Judging focuses on vocal technique, pitch, and stage presence. Registration is Rs.250, and instrumental backing tracks are allowed.
fields.longDescription:
Akaar- Eastern Vocals is a solo singing competition celebrating the richness of regional music through expressive and technically strong performances. The event follows an online preliminary round where participants submit their recordings, and a live final round for shortlisted performers. Each participant registers with a fee of Rs.250.
Finalists may perform with or without instrumental or karaoke accompaniment; however, only the vocal performance will be evaluated. Backing tracks must be instrumental-only and submitted in advance. Each performer is allotted a maximum of five minutes on stage, with deductions for exceeding the time limit.
Judging will focus on vocal technique, pitch and intonation, rhythm, creativity, song choice, stage presence, and overall impact. Any form of vulgarity will result in immediate disqualification, and the judges’ decision will be final and binding.

fields.eventName: Prelims : Polyphony - Western Battle of Bands
fields.shortDescription: Polyphony is a Western Battle of Bands for college groups. Featuring live English performances, the event focuses on originality and synchronization. Shortlisted bands from the online prelims will compete in a finale.
fields.longDescription: Polyphony - Western Battle of Bands is a competitive platform for college bands to showcase their musical talent through live English performances. Bands (4-9 members) will participate in an online preliminary round, followed by an on-stage finale for shortlisted teams. The event emphasizes originality, creativity, synchronization, and stage presence, with strict no-backing-track rules to maintain performance authenticity. Finalists will be given a defined stage time and must bring their own instruments (drum kit provided). Registration is Rs.300 per member for bands qualifying for the final round. Decisions by the judging panel will be final.

fields.shortDescription: PromptCraft is an AI-based challenge where participants use written prompts to recreate or reinterpret images and concepts. It focuses on creativity and intentionality, encouraging beginners to experiment with AI-driven visual storytelling.
fields.longDescription:
PromptCraft is a creative, AI-based challenge where ideas matter more than technical skills. Participants are given a reference image, video concept, or a set of objects, and their task is to recreate or reinterpret it using AI through carefully written prompts. The challenge lies in how well you can translate an idea into words and guide the AI to generate an output that feels accurate, creative, and intentional.

There are no restrictions on style or imagination. Some may aim for close accuracy, while others may turn the same reference into something completely unexpected. PromptCraft is designed to be beginner-friendly and open to anyone curious about creativity and AI. It encourages experimentation, attention to detail, and thinking beyond the obvious.

fields.shortDescription: Crescendo is a solo Western vocal competition featuring English-language performances. Following an online preliminary round, finalists will perform live, judged on vocal technique, pitch accuracy, and stage presence.
fields.longDescription:
Crescendo- Western Vocals is a solo singing competition designed to highlight vocal talent through English-language performances. The event features two stages: an online preliminary round where participants submit their recordings, and a live final round for shortlisted performers. Registration for each participant is Rs.250.
Finalists may sing with or without instrumental or karaoke accompaniment, though only the vocal performance will be judged. Backing tracks must be instrumental-only and submitted in advance. Each performer is given a maximum of five minutes on stage, and exceeding this limit will result in deductions.
Judging focuses on vocal technique, pitch accuracy, rhythm, stage presence, song choice, creativity, and overall impact. Any form of vulgarity will lead to immediate disqualification, and the judges’ decision will be final and binding.

fields.shortDescription: In this unique pitching challenge, participants receive absurdly convoluted and unusable products. They must use their persuasion skills to convince a panel of the item's worth, turning a ridiculous concept into a winning sales pitch.
fields.longDescription: Participants are provided with a ridiculous, almost unusable product that is unnecessarily convoluted. They must pitch this product to a panel and convince them of its worth.

fields.shortDescription: Therottam is a tournament-style game show testing quick thinking and teamwork. Participants engage in diverse mini-games like AI image guessing and literary treasure hunts to solve problems and emerge as the ultimate arena champion.
fields.longDescription: Therottam is a game show event that combines quick thinking, teamwork, and out-of- the-box problem-solving to crown the ultimate champion of the arena. The event features multiple engaging mini-games, such as guessing a word from an Al-generated image and participating in a literary treasure hunt. Designed in a tournament-style format, teams compete across rounds, testing their creativity, strategy, and speed, until one winner emerges victorious.

fields.shortDescription: Green Screen challenges blindfolded participants to act out and report on movie clips playing behind them. Guided only by hints from judges, they must maintain a conversation while figuring out the scene to succeed in this unique task.
fields.longDescription:
Green screen 
In this event, participants will be blind folded in front of a screen on which a random famous movie clip will be played. 
The participants are not aware of what clip is playing behind them however they must act and report on what's going on behind them while maintaining conversation with the judges where the judge will drop subtle hints about the clip for the participants to catch on

fields.shortDescription: Magadh Mahotsav Carnival is a lively cultural celebration at Vibrance’26 featuring interactive games and playful challenges. Open to duos for a ₹50 fee, it offers a buzzing space filled with energy, joy, and competitive fun for all.
fields.longDescription:
🎡 Magadh Mahotsav Carnival | Vibrance’26 🎶

Magadh Mithila Club presents to you the Magadh Mahotsav Carnival, a lively fusion of joy, culture, and celebration at Vibrance’26. Step into a buzzing carnival space where every corner promises excitement, packed with fun and interactive games that challenge, entertain, and bring out your playful side. Jump in, take on the challenges, and let the carnival energy carry you through.

✨ Entry: Duos only
💰 Fee: ₹50 per duo

The stalls are set, the games are calling, let the fun begin! ✨

fields.shortDescription: Namma Mela 2.0 is a vibrant cultural carnival by the Kannada Literary Association featuring games, art, crafts, and hands-on workshops like painting, pottery, and Lippan art—bringing students together through creativity, fun, and connection.
fields.longDescription:
Namma Mela 2.0 is a warm, vibrant carnival organised by the Kannada Literary Association to bring students together through creativity, culture, and shared experiences. The event is designed as an open, interactive space where every participant can explore a new form of expression. Students can challenge their strength and team spirit in Arm Wrestling, or slow down and paint their thoughts on Canvas Painting stations. Those who enjoy crafts can create personalised accessories at the Bracelet Making booth, while the Wish Jar corner invites everyone to pause, reflect, and share their hopes for the year.
To celebrate art, we are hosting hands on Lippan Art and Pottery workshops, allowing participants to experience the joy of shaping something with their own hands.
This event aims to create a lively cultural atmosphere on campus, one that encourages creativity, connection, and a sense of belonging among all students.

fields.shortDescription: Anime Auction: Battle of Builds is a strategic team event where participants bid on characters to create the ultimate lineup. After a qualifying quiz, teams manage budgets and follow specific roster rules to maximize their scores based on character stren
fields.longDescription: Anime Auction: Battle of Builds is a team-based strategy event where participants compete to build the ultimate anime character lineup. Teams first play a short quiz round to earn bonus points and narrow down the competition. In the main auction round, each team receives an equal budget and bids on characters from different anime and genres, each with a preset rating. Teams must plan carefully to meet mandatory “hard rules” for their roster (such as minimum number of characters, required female characters, and villains), while also considering “soft rules” like team roles (leader, support, tank, etc.). In the final round, teams present their character setups, and scores are calculated from roster strength, quiz bonuses, and efficient budget use.

fields.shortDescription: Classrooms become escape rooms where teams solve literary clues. Themes include Murder Mystery, Harry Potter, and Mythology. Work together to decode puzzles and escape before time runs out in this immersive, story-driven team challenge.
fields.longDescription:
Classrooms will be turned into Escape rooms, where participants will go in as teams and try to escape the room by solving the series of literary clues provided to them.
Themes:
Murder mystery. Solve the murder mystery to get out or get killed by the killer.
Stranger things/Dungeons and dragons
Harry Potter
Medieval themed
Greek/Roman mythology

fields.shortDescription: This horror-themed event challenges participants to solve film-related riddles to escape a haunted room. Players must navigate obstacles and ghosts while working through this immersive blend of a horror house experience and puzzle-solving.
fields.longDescription: This event is set up in a horror theme where participants have to solve puzzles in order to escape the horror room. It blends horror house and riddles and puzzles relating to films to be solved so that they advance and find a way out despite the obstacles put out by the ghosts in the room.

fields.shortDescription: Gather your team for a high-stakes Valorant E-sports tournament. Compete head-to-head in this thrilling tactical shooter showdown where strategy and skill determine the winner. Experience the intense competitive energy of elite gaming.
fields.longDescription: It's a Valorant E-sport tournament. Each team go head to head for a thrilling valorant showdown

fields.shortDescription: Experience Indian governance in this Lok Sabha simulation. Participants represent members of parliament, debating national issues using official protocols. This moderated event builds leadership, public speaking, and constitutional awareness.
fields.longDescription:
Lok Sabha Simulation,  Debate aeDemocracy is an interactive literary event that aims to provide students with a realistic experience of India’s parliamentary functioning. Participants will engage in a structured and safe debate on relevant social and national issues, following the official parliamentary mode of discussion. Each participant will represent a member of the Lok Sabha and present arguments, raise points, and respond to counter-views in a disciplined and democratic manner.

The session will be moderated by an experienced speaker, ensuring decorum, balanced participation, and meaningful dialogue throughout the debate. This event encourages students to develop critical thinking, public speaking, leadership, and constitutional awareness, while also promoting respectful disagreement and informed discussion.

The simulation is open to all students interested in politics, governance, and social issues. It offers a unique opportunity to understand the values of democracy beyond textbooks and actively participate in a vibrant exchange of ideas.

fields.shortDescription: This quiz celebrates Telugu culture, covering history, language, and scriptures, with a primary focus on cinema. The event aims to entertain students and build social skills within the lively atmosphere of the Vibrance festival.
fields.longDescription:
The event will feature a five-round quiz covering the Telugu Culture including the Language, History, Scriptures and besides that Majority of the Quiz revolves around Cinema. 
The Objective of this event is to gather students in participation of an entertaining event and an to enlighten their evening alongside the hype of the Vibrance later on. The event intends to be both enjoyable and meaningful through helping the students build social skills, share experiences and to make a lasting memory within the lively atmosphere during the event with the rest of its community.

fields.shortDescription: Human Snake and Ladder is a life-sized version of the classic game where players become the pieces. With dice rolls, surprise snakes and ladders, and fun tasks on each square, it promotes teamwork, laughter, and energetic group bonding for all ages.
fields.longDescription:
Human Snake and Ladder is an exciting and interactive informal event designed to bring participants together through fun, teamwork, and friendly competition. Inspired by the classic board game, this life-sized version transforms players themselves into the game pieces, making the experience lively and engaging. Participants move across a large grid based on dice outcomes, encountering “snakes” and “ladders” that add unexpected twists, challenges, and rewards. Each square may involve simple tasks, quizzes, or fun activities that encourage communication, creativity, and quick thinking.

The event promotes team bonding, coordination, and active participation while creating a cheerful and energetic atmosphere. Suitable for all age groups, Human Snake and Ladder ensures inclusivity and entertainment without requiring any prior skills. With laughter, suspense, and moments of surprise at every turn, the event offers a refreshing break from routine activities and helps participants connect in a relaxed and enjoyable setting.

fields.shortDescription: This Women's Badminton team event is part of the All India Level Tournament. The competition features singles, doubles, and reverse singles. All gameplay follows AIU regulations, ensuring a fair environment for athletes to show their skills.
fields.longDescription: The Women’s Badminton event is a team competition conducted at the All India Level Inter-Collegiate Tournament. The competition includes Singles, Doubles, and Reverse Singles formats, played as per Association of Indian Universities (AIU)-prescribed rules.

fields.shortDescription: The Men's Badminton team competition at the All India Level Tournament includes singles, doubles, and reverse singles. Governed by AIU rules, this event demands technical proficiency and discipline from teams in a professional setting.
fields.longDescription: The Men’s Badminton event is a team competition conducted at the All India Level Inter-Collegiate Tournament. The event comprises Singles, Doubles, and Reverse Singles matches, conducted strictly according to Association of Indian Universities (AIU) rules and regulations.

fields.shortDescription: This Men's Futsal 5-a-side competition is held at the All India Level Tournament. Adhering to AIU rules, the event focuses on technical skill and teamwork, providing a platform for teams to engage in competitive and disciplined gameplay.
fields.longDescription: The Men’s Futsal (5-a-side) event is a team competition conducted at the All India Level Inter-Collegiate Tournament. Matches will be played as per Association of Indian Universities (AIU) rules and regulations, emphasizing technical skill, teamwork, and fast-paced gameplay.

fields.shortDescription: Chameleon is a solo monoacting event where performers shift characters and emotions instantly. Actors must switch voices and body language without props or cast. The focus is on transformational acting, versatility, and captivating the audience.
fields.longDescription: Chameleon is a solo monoacting event that tests a performer’s ability to shift characters, emotions, and scenarios instantly. Participants take the stage alone and deliver a dynamic, high-impact performance where they must adapt like a chameleon—switching voices, expressions, body language, and narrative tones with precision. The piece can be dramatic, comedic, or abstract, but must clearly showcase versatility, control, and stage presence. The focus is on transformational acting, creativity, and the performer’s ability to hold the audience’s attention without any supporting cast, props, or technical aids.

fields.eventName: Prelims : Aakriti - Eastern Battle of Bands
fields.shortDescription: Aakriti celebrates regional musical heritage through an Eastern Battle of Bands. Shortlisted teams from online rounds will perform live. The competition emphasizes synchronization and stage presence using regional languages.
fields.longDescription:
Aakriti - Eastern Battle of Bands is a curated platform that celebrates regional musical heritage through powerful live band performances. Student bands with 4-9 members will compete first in an online preliminary round, after which selected teams will advance to the on-stage finals. The event maintains performance authenticity by requiring all pieces to be in regional languages and strictly prohibiting backing tracks.
Finalists will perform within a defined 20-minute stage slot, ensuring consistency and smooth event flow. Bands must bring their own instruments, with a drum kit made available by the organizers. Judging will emphasize creativity, originality, synchronization, uniqueness, and overall stage presence. Any form of vulgarity will lead to immediate disqualification, and the judging panel’s decision will be final.

fields.shortDescription: Component Chaos is a hands-on electronics challenge where teams receive a box of random parts with no instructions. Participants must analyze components and design a working circuit, testing their practical knowledge and creativity.
fields.longDescription: Component Chaos is a hands-on electronics challenge where participants are given a sealed box containing a random set of electronic components. With no circuit diagram or prior instructions, teams must analyze the components, understand their purpose, and design a working circuit within the given time. This event tests participants’ practical electronics knowledge, problem-solving skills, teamwork, and creativity under pressure. The goal is not just to make a circuit work, but to think like an engineer and bring logic out of chaos.

fields.shortDescription: Experience the thrill of a professional IPL auction in this one-day event. Ten teams compete to bid on players and build the ultimate cricket squad. The participant who assembles the strongest and most balanced team wins the competition.
fields.longDescription: IPL Auction is a 1 day event where multiple teams compete together split up as 10 teams in a single venue, bidding on IPL Players. The one with the best team built wins the competition.

With no circuit diagram or prior instructions, teams must analyze the components, understand their purpose, and design a working circuit within the given time. This event tests participants’ practical electronics knowledge, problem-solving skills, teamwork, and creativity under pressure. The goal is not just to make a circuit work, but to think like an engineer and bring logic out of chaos.

fields.shortDescription: Experience an Indian-themed haunted house filled with realistic props, actors, and jump scares. Teams have five minutes to navigate dark rooms using torches, searching for clues to escape this interactive and thrilling storyline.
fields.longDescription: The event is an Indian-themed haunted house built around an engaging storyline. Participants enter with a time limit (of about five minutes) in teams and move through a sequence of darkened rooms created using black partitions. There are a lot of realistic props (like spider webs, kitchen setup, etc) placed. Each team is given a torch and must search the space for clues that help them progress. The environment is low-lit to build suspense with live actrs, roaming characters and jump scares. As the team moves ahead, they must stay alert, and piece together the clues while navigating unexpected scares. The overall event combines the thrill of a haunted house with elements of story and escape rooms. Hence being interactive and exciting to join.

fields.shortDescription: Eco Shark Tank is a sustainability pitch-thon where teams present green solutions. Participants pitch to judges and an audience using mock currency to invest. Winners are chosen based on total funding received and expert evaluation.
fields.longDescription: Eco Shark Tank is a sustainability-focused pitch-thon where students present innovative ideas addressing environmental and social challenges. Participants can register in teams and will be given prior time to prepare their pitches. On the day of the event, teams will pitch their solutions to a panel and live audience within a fixed time limit. Each pitch will be followed by a short Q&A session to assess feasibility, impact, and innovation. To encourage audience engagement, attendees will be given mock currency to invest in the ideas they find most promising. The final winners will be determined based on the total “funding” received along with judges’ evaluation. The event aims to promote entrepreneurial thinking, sustainability awareness, and problem-solving skills among students in an interactive way.

fields.shortDescription: This inter-college parliamentary debate competition fosters critical thinking and public speaking on global issues. Teams engage in structured discourse, presenting persuasive arguments and rebuttals to promote democratic values and social awareness.
fields.longDescription: This Inter-College Parliamentary Debate Competition aims to provide a platform for students to engage in structured, intellectual discourse on contemporary national and global issues. The event follows the parliamentary style of debating, encouraging critical thinking, persuasive speaking, teamwork, and quick rebuttals. Each team consists of three speakers who represent either the Proposition or the Opposition, debating a motion released shortly before the rounds. The competition fosters democratic values, public speaking confidence, and awareness of socio-political matters among students.The final round will determine the winning team, with attractive prizes awarded to the best teams and speakers.

fields.shortDescription: This technical escape room challenges teams to solve semiconductor-based puzzles and electronic riddles. Participants must use engineering instincts and collaboration to decode complex clues and innovate their way to freedom before time expires.
fields.longDescription: Escape Room: Engineer’s Gambit is a Circuital Based paced, challenge where participants solve puzzles on semiconductor based break outs before time runs out. The room is filled with logic clues, technical riddles on electronics, and real-world problem-solving tasks that test creativity, teamwork, and quick thinking. Every decision matters, and collaboration is key to cracking the final escape. It’s an exciting, hands-on experience that brings out the engineer’s instinct to analyze, adapt, and innovate under pressure.

fields.shortDescription: Engage in a board-game inspired activity focused on stock trading and asset management. Participants make strategic financial decisions to learn about investment, risk, and ethical business practices in a competitive environment.
fields.longDescription:
A board-game inspired activity where participants trade stocks, manage assets, 
and make strategic financial decisions. This will help them understand the basics 
of investment, risk, and ethical business decisions.

fields.clubName: IEEE EDS Student Branch Chapter VIT Chennai
fields.shortDescription: Navigate a room filled with laser paths and sensors. Participants must reach the exit while collecting specific objects without interrupting any beams. Any contact with lasers results in disqualification, testing your precision and agility.
fields.longDescription:
The event consists of a room arranged with multiple laser paths monitored using LDR sensors. A single participant enters the room and must cross from the starting point to the exit without interrupting any laser beam. Any disturbance detected by the sensors will be counted as a fault.

In addition to navigating through the lasers, a few objects are placed at different locations inside the room. The participant is required to collect or grab these items while moving through the space, without triggering any laser detection. Touching a laser or activating a sensor will result in disqualification.

fields.shortDescription: Teams of three to four represent contingents in this multi-sport event. Participants tackle various tech-friendly mini-challenges, earning points for speed and problem-solving. A leaderboard tracks progress as teams rotate through the arenas.
fields.longDescription:
The Olympics is a team-based event designed to recreate the excitement and structure of a multi-sport Olympic Games. Teams of 3–4 participants represent a single contingent and compete across a series of distinct mini tech-friendly challenges, each functioning as an independent challenge. These events are designed to test a balanced mix of speed, coordination, problem-solving, and teamwork.
Participants rotate across multiple event arenas, earning points based on performance and strategy, with cumulative scores tracked on a central leaderboard. Timed rounds, structured progression, and surprise elements ensure a dynamic and engaging experience throughout the competition.

fields.shortDescription: A two-part RPG adventure where teams complete campus quests to gain levels and gold. Qualified teams then enter a knockout tournament, using their developed characters and skills in tactical, turn-based battles managed via simulation software.
fields.longDescription:
This two-part adventure-combat event blends strategy, teamwork, and immersive gameplay. In Level 1: Adventure Begins, teams of three navigate a quest-based storyline across campus using a provided map. At each quest location, NPC hosts guide teams through competitive mini-games and challenges. Winning quests rewards teams with levels, skill points, and gold, which can later be used to purchase skills. Special features include an Endless Mode combat zone for extra rewards and roaming Bandits who ambush teams for surprise battles. The first teams to successfully complete four quests advance.

In Level 2: Tournament Phase, qualified teams enter a knockout-style, turn-based battle tournament. Using characters developed in Level 1 (max level 6, two skills per member), teams battle via simulation software with host mediation and occasional dice rolls. The last team standing wins, making this an engaging mix of treasure hunt, RPG progression, and tactical combat.

fields.shortDescription: Participants spin a wheel of Sustainable Development Goals to determine their focus. In breakout groups, they brainstorm and develop a creative business idea linked to that specific goal within a set time, promoting quick thinking.
fields.longDescription: Participants spin a wheel of Sustainable Development Goals. They get a specified amount of a time in a breakout group to brainstorm a business idea linked to that goal.

fields.shortDescription: Enjoy literature and pop culture games like Book Cover Balderdash and Plot Hole. Solo or team players solve riddles, identify quotes, and describe clues. A fun mix of creative storytelling and quick thinking for all literature fans.
fields.longDescription:
The event consists of an amalgamation of small games, all themed around literature and pop culture. It's open to both solo and team participants. 
1) Book Cover Balderdash- Creating our own interpretation of obscure book plots based on their covers 
2) BookBookMovie- Identifying a portmanteau (consisting of 1 book title and 1 movie) based of cryptic hints 
3) Plot Hole- Identify and elaborate on a plot hole in a book or show of your choice, convincing the audience of how it ruins the story entirely. 
4) Monikers- A chit gets pulled, the team member has to describe it in 4 words, they keep 
moving to the next chit until the time runs out. The same clue will be used in the next round, but they can only describe it in 2 words, in the final round they can only use actions. 
5) Pin the quote- Similar to pint the tail on the donkey, there will be half quotes on a wall and a bunch of options attached to pins spread around, the participant must pin the right half to the wall.

fields.eventName: Campus Conspiracy: The Case That Wasn’t Supposed to Exist
fields.shortDescription: Campus Conspiracy is an immersive mystery where teams act as investigators to solve campus secrets. Teams explore locations, connect cryptic clues, and use reasoning to uncover the truth. The group with the most logical conclusion wins.
fields.longDescription:
Campus Conspiracy is an immersive, mystery-driven team event where participants are drawn into a strange situation unfolding somewhere on campus. Teams step into the role of investigators and are given limited information to begin with. From there, they explore different locations, interact with various sources, and uncover pieces of information as the story slowly reveals itself.

Nothing is straightforward. Some details help, others confuse, and not everything can be trusted. Teams must observe carefully, connect dots, and discuss their findings before jumping to conclusions. 

The challenge lies in how well participants think, reason, and work together under uncertainty. The team that best understands the situation and supports their conclusion with strong reasoning emerges as the winner, making the event intriguing, engaging, and full of suspense.

fields.longDescription: Participants spin a wheel of Sustainable Development Goals. They get a specified amount of a time in a breakout group to brainstorm a business idea linked to that goal.

fields.shortDescription: The Crowd Says is a team event where participants guess the most popular responses to relatable questions about college life and pop culture. It rewards those who can think like the majority, fostering a fun, energetic, and light-hearted atmosphere.
fields.longDescription: The Crowd Says is an engaging, team-based informal event designed to test how well participants can think like the majority. Instead of focusing on correct or factual answers, the event challenges teams to guess the most popular responses that people are likely to give to a question. The questions are fun, relatable, and centered around college life, daily habits, pop culture, and common social situations, making it easy for students to connect and participate enthusiastically. Each team is given a limited time to discuss and present their answers, earning points based on how popular their responses are. The event encourages teamwork, quick thinking, and spontaneous decision-making, while also keeping the atmosphere light-hearted and entertaining. With active audience involvement, humorous moments, and friendly competition, The Crowd Says creates an energetic environment that appeals to both participants and spectators. It is an ideal event to bring students together and add excitement to the cultural lineup.

fields.shortDescription: Anime Auction: Battle of Builds is a strategic team event where participants bid on characters to create the ultimate lineup. After a qualifying quiz, teams manage budgets and follow specific roster rules to maximize their scores based on character stren
fields.longDescription: Anime Auction: Battle of Builds is a team-based strategy event where participants compete to build the ultimate anime character lineup. Teams first play a short quiz round to earn bonus points and narrow down the competition. In the main auction round, each team receives an equal budget and bids on characters from different anime and genres, each with a preset rating. Teams must plan carefully to meet mandatory “hard rules” for their roster (such as minimum number of characters, required female characters, and villains), while also considering “soft rules” like team roles (leader, support, tank, etc.). In the final round, teams present their character setups, and scores are calculated from roster strength, quiz bonuses, and efficient budget use.

fields.eventName: Three to Tango | Sketch •  Guess • Design
fields.shortDescription: A unique reverse-Pictionary challenge for teams of three. One member describes a mystery object, the second identifies it, and the third replicates it using CAD or drawing tools. Success depends on clear communication and speed.
fields.longDescription:
One describes, one guesses, one designs—can your team recreate the object before time runs out?

Pictionary but make it UNO reverse! 
Teams of three take on the challenge. One member describes a mystery object—without saying its name. Another cracks the clue, while the third races against time to sketch or replicate it using CAD/Drawing.

fields.shortDescription: Engage in a board-game inspired activity focused on stock trading and asset management. Participants make strategic financial decisions to learn about investment, risk, and ethical business practices in a competitive environment.
fields.longDescription:
A board-game inspired activity where participants trade stocks, manage assets, 
and make strategic financial decisions. This will help them understand the basics 
of investment, risk, and ethical business decisions.

fields.shortDescription: This interactive general knowledge quiz covers diverse topics like science and history through multiple rounds. Individuals or teams compete in increasingly difficult stages to score points and win, promoting a fun, educational atmosphere.
fields.longDescription: Fun and interactive general knowledge quiz where students answer questions from a wide range of topics such as current affairs, basic science, history, sports, pop culture, and the environment. The quiz will be conducted in multiple rounds with increasing difficulty to keep it interesting and engaging. Participants can take part individually or in teams. The event focuses on learning while having fun and encourages healthy competition among students. Winners will be decided based on the total scores at the end of all rounds.

fields.shortDescription: Teams play interactive games that evolve through unexpected rule changes and disruptions. Success depends on adaptability and quick thinking as dynamics shift every few minutes, testing coordination and teamwork in a high-energy environment.
fields.longDescription:
GameShift is a fast-paced, interactive team-based event where participants play simple games that constantly evolve through unexpected rule changes. Teams are first briefed on a base game and its workflow. These base games can include activities like throwing a ball at a target, memory or pattern challenges, coordination-based tasks, or logic and strategy mini-games.

As the game progresses, periodic “disruptions” are introduced every few minutes, altering the rules, team dynamics, time limits, or communication methods. These disruptions force teams to quickly adapt, rethink strategies, and coordinate under pressure.

The focus of GameShift is not just winning, but demonstrating adaptability, creativity, and teamwork in a constantly changing environment. The event is designed to be fun, engaging, and accessible to all students, with minimal resources and maximum participation. By the end of the event, teams will have experienced multiple shifts in gameplay, making it a high-energy and memorable experience for both participants and spectators.

fields.shortDescription: Experience an Indian-themed haunted house filled with realistic props, actors, and jump scares. Teams have five minutes to navigate dark rooms using torches, searching for clues to escape this interactive and thrilling storyline.
fields.longDescription: The event is an Indian-themed haunted house built around an engaging storyline. Participants enter with a time limit (of about five minutes) in teams and move through a sequence of darkened rooms created using black partitions. There are a lot of realistic props (like spider webs, kitchen setup, etc) placed. Each team is given a torch and must search the space for clues that help them progress. The environment is low-lit to build suspense with live actrs, roaming characters and jump scares. As the team moves ahead, they must stay alert, and piece together the clues while navigating unexpected scares. The overall event combines the thrill of a haunted house with elements of story and escape rooms. Hence being interactive and exciting to join.

fields.shortDescription: SAE’s Click-n-Shift Adventure is an automotive-themed photographic treasure hunt. Teams solve pictorial clues related to mechanical concepts and motorsports, racing to capture specific objects while demonstrating fast thinking and teamwork in a fun, comp
fields.longDescription:
SAE's Click-n-Shift Adventure is a campus-wide photographic treasure hunt where teams of 2–4 members race to solve AUTOMOTIVE - themed pictorial clues hidden across the college. Each clue leads to a new location, a MECHANICAL concept, or an AUTOMOTIVE object you must spot, capture, or decode.
Fast thinking, teamwork, and sharp eyes win the day — all while exploring the campus in a fun, competitive, and MOTORSPORT - inspired adventure.

fields.shortDescription: Eco Shark Tank is a sustainability pitch-thon where teams present green solutions. Participants pitch to judges and an audience using mock currency to invest. Winners are chosen based on total funding received and expert evaluation.
fields.longDescription: Eco Shark Tank is a sustainability-focused pitch-thon where students present innovative ideas addressing environmental and social challenges. Participants can register in teams and will be given prior time to prepare their pitches. On the day of the event, teams will pitch their solutions to a panel and live audience within a fixed time limit. Each pitch will be followed by a short Q&A session to assess feasibility, impact, and innovation. To encourage audience engagement, attendees will be given mock currency to invest in the ideas they find most promising. The final winners will be determined based on the total “funding” received along with judges’ evaluation. The event aims to promote entrepreneurial thinking, sustainability awareness, and problem-solving skills among students in an interactive way.

fields.longDescription: It's a Valorant E-sport tournament. Each team go head to head for a thrilling valorant showdown

fields.longDescription: IPL Auction is a 1 day event where multiple teams compete together split up as 10 teams in a single venue, bidding on IPL Players. The one with the best team built wins the competition.

fields.shortDescription: Teams celebrate India's culinary diversity by cooking assigned regional breakfast dishes from outside their own backgrounds. Using limited resources, they recreate authentic flavors from scratch. Judging is based on taste and teamwork.
fields.longDescription:
The Regional Breakfast Challenge is a unique cooking-based event designed to celebrate India’s rich culinary diversity. In this event, participating teams will be randomly assigned a traditional regional breakfast dish from India, such as Idli–Sambar, Poha, Upma, Paratha, Appam, or Dhokla. The key twist is that none of the team members will belong to the region from which the dish originates, encouraging participants to step outside their comfort zones.

Teams will be provided with basic ingredients and utensils, along with a limited preparation time. They must research, understand, and recreate the dish from scratch using only the resources provided. No prior practice or outside assistance will be allowed during the event. Participants will be judged on taste, authenticity, presentation, teamwork, and time management.

The event promotes cross-cultural learning, creativity, and collaboration, while giving students a hands-on experience of India’s culinary heritage. It also encourages adaptability and problem-solving under pressure, making it both educational and entertaining. The Regional Breakfast Challenge blends fun with learning, turning cooking into a vibrant cultural experience.

fields.shortDescription: A collaboration between TEDx VIT Chennai, History TV18, and the UN, this event features a series of insightful talks. Experts and speakers share powerful ideas and perspectives aimed at shaping the future and understanding our modern world.
fields.longDescription: A collaborative event between TEDX VIT CHENNAI, History TV18, City of Kitchener and United Nations where we will be having a series  of talks that shape the modern world.

fields.shortDescription: This leadership-themed escape room challenges teams to solve corporate crises through puzzles. Within 45 minutes, participants navigate ethics and conflict resolution, enhancing teamwork and decision-making skills in a high-pressure, engaging simulated b
fields.longDescription:
“Escape the Boardroom” is an immersive, leadership-themed escape room designed to help participants experience real corporate decision-making under pressure. The activity places teams inside a simulated “boardroom crisis,” where they must solve a sequence of business-based puzzles to escape within 45 minutes. Each stage represents a leadership challenge—ethics, crisis communication, time management, conflict resolution, and vision building.

Teams of 2-4 players move through 3–5 themed “locks.” For example, they analyze HR clues to solve an ethical dilemma, draft a PR response during a crisis, prioritize tasks under a strict deadline, match conflict-resolution strategies to different personality types, and reconstruct the company’s mission from fragmented documents. These challenges require teamwork, clear communication, problem-solving, and quick, responsible decision-making.

Scoring is based on time taken, correctness of decisions, and teamwork as observed by facilitators. The event is easy to set up using printed clues, role cards, whiteboards, and a Game Master.

Overall, Escape the Boardroom offers a fun, high-impact learning experience that builds leadership qualities, strengthens collaboration, and simulates real-world pressures in an engaging way.

fields.shortDescription: Inspired by the "Reign of Terror," teams must identify a secret spy while completing tasks for points. Captains use clues to find the traitor, navigating enemy factions and safe zones in this strategic, revolutionary-themed game.
fields.longDescription:
Our event is inspired by Maximilien Robespierre’s “Reign of Terror,” where participants play revolutionaries attempting to overthrow him in a strategic team-based game. Each team consists of four members: one captain and three soldiers, among whom one is secretly a spy from Robespierre’s Ghost Agents tasked with eliminating the entire team.

The captain’s role is to identify and eliminate the spy within a fixed time limit. Only the captain can make this decision, based on clues provided and team discussions held only at designated checkpoints. Teams must also complete tasks to earn points, which are required to hand over the spy. Rule violations lead to point deductions, and repeated violations result in disqualification.

Teams are divided into allied and enemy factions, with some tasks requiring cooperation between allies. Enemy teams may eliminate one opposing member after earning sufficient points. National Guards mark safe zones where eliminations are prohibited. Winners are determined by points and successful identification of the spy.

fields.shortDescription: Embark on an exciting hunt where each clue leads to a new location. Participants must complete health and wellness tasks at every checkpoint to progress. The first individual or team to finish all challenges and reach the destination wins.
fields.longDescription: The  Hunt begins at a starting point where participants receive their first clue. Each clue leads them to a new location, where they must complete a health-related task to earn the next clue. This continues through multiple checkpoints, combining fun with fitness and wellness awareness. The participant or team that completes all tasks and reaches the final destination first wins the hunt.

fields.shortDescription: Join this high-energy Punjabi twist on the classic Tambola game. Expect loud calls, desi humor, and nonstop crowd interaction. With unexpected twists and pure luck, it is a celebratory evening where numbers and friends come together.
fields.longDescription:
Get ready for a high-energy Punjabi twist on the classic Tambola game. This isn’t a silent, boring numbers session — it’s loud calls, desi humour, unexpected twists, and nonstop crowd interaction.

Every round brings new surprises, quick wins, and moments where luck decides everything. Whether you’re playing to win or just there for the vibe, the energy stays high and the fun doesn’t drop for a second.

Come with friends, shout your numbers, flex your luck, and enjoy an evening where numbers aren’t just called — they’re celebrated.

Luck shows up once.
Make sure you’re there when it does.

fields.shortDescription: This high-intensity escape room, inspired by Punjab’s heritage, challenges teams to solve handcrafted puzzles and logic tasks. Within fifteen minutes, participants must unlock mechanisms and collect symbolic keys to successfully navigate the storyline.
fields.longDescription:
A high-intensity escape room built entirely from scratch, inspired by Punjab’s rich structure, symbols, and problem-solving traditions.
Teams have 15 minutes to crack handcrafted puzzles, solve logic challenges, and unlock mechanisms to collect 10 symbolic cards/keys woven into a Punjab-structured storyline.
Only teams that think fast, work smart, and adapt quickly will make it out.

fields.shortDescription: Retrieve a stolen Dean File in the Shadow Cipher Protocol. Teams navigate campus, decoding cryptic messages, symbols, and false leads left by The Veiled Circle. Only the sharpest minds will solve the riddles and unlock the final seal.
fields.longDescription:
A top-secret Dean File has vanished from the college archives.
A covert group calling itself The Veiled Circle has scattered coded messages, symbolic clues, and misleading trails across the campus.
Nothing is direct.
Every clue is layered.
Every location is hidden behind riddles, shapes, and encrypted messages.

Your team must think like real investigators — decode ciphers, uncover symbolic pathways, break false clues, and uncover the truth.

Only the sharpest team will reach the final chamber, unlock the master seal, 
and retrieve the missing Dean File before time runs out.

Are you ready to enter the Shadow Cipher Protocol?

fields.shortDescription: Join Haryana Hood’s vibrant cultural mela featuring pottery, mehendi, and painting stalls. Enjoy games like gulel, lively music, and performances celebrating Haryana’s spirit through art, tradition, and student-led entertainment.
fields.longDescription: The cultural club Haryana Hood is organizing a vibrant mela celebrating art, tradition, and fun. The event will begin with the setup of colorful stalls, each offering a unique experience — from traditional pottery where visitors can try their hand at shaping clay, to creative mehendi and painting corners showcasing artistic talent. Alongside, exciting game stalls like gulel and darts will add a playful competitive spirit to the atmosphere. A lively music system will set the mood throughout the event, filling the air with energy and rhythm. Short performances by club members will keep the crowd entertained, adding a cultural flair to the celebration. Together, the combination of art, games, music, and performance will create a joyful and engaging experience, reflecting the vibrant spirit of Haryana and the enthusiasm of the students behind the event.

fields.shortDescription: Immerse yourself in a Japanese folklore escape room. Solve puzzles to uncover a cursed story. Eliminated players become spirits, influencing remaining participants with misdirection as the tragic narrative unfolds through hidden clues.
fields.longDescription:
The event is a Japanese folklore–inspired escape room presented as a story-driven mystery. Participants enter a dimly lit space where a cursed ghost story unfolds through a sequence of small, riddle-based games. Clues are hidden in simple objects such as plates, mirrors, and written fragments, with lighting used to shift mood and reveal information as the story progresses.

Players encounter in-game spirits and uncover pieces of a tragic narrative, gradually understanding the nature of the curse tied to the room. As the game advances, players are eliminated in stages. Eliminated players remain inside the experience as spirits, subtly influencing the remaining participants through misdirection, incomplete truths, or symbolic interaction.

fields.shortDescription: CODE RED is a Youth Red Cross escape room event where teams navigate emergency scenarios. Participants solve clues and make rapid decisions regarding first aid and disaster preparedness to complete challenges before time runs out.
fields.longDescription: CODE RED is an exciting escape room–style event by the Youth Red Cross where teams step into a simulated emergency scenario and race against time to save the day. You’ll crack clues, make quick decisions, and work together to complete challenges related to first aid, health awareness, and disaster preparedness.

fields.shortDescription: Ground Zero is a high-stakes tournament featuring general knowledge clashes, SDG puzzles, and escape room scenarios. Hosted by the Women Development Cell, it blends adrenaline-fueled competition with vital discussions on gender equality and empowerment.
fields.longDescription:
Ground Zero erupts as the ultimate battleground for brains, bravado, and breakneck escapes! Hosted by the Women Development Cell, this pulse-pounding knockout tournament unleashes solo showdowns and duo duels fueled by rapid-fire general knowledge clashes, Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) brain-benders, and heart-racing escape room scenarios.

Picture this: time-locked chambers where every second counts—crack cryptic puzzles, outsmart high-stakes riddles, and blast through immersive traps under crushing countdowns, all while forging unbreakable bonds or unleashing solo fury to survive eliminations.

Beyond the adrenaline overload, Ground Zero sparks fierce conversations on gender equality, equal opportunities, and collective empowerment, transforming rivals into revolutionaries for a bolder world.

fields.shortDescription: In this movie-themed challenge, duos navigate hidden booths to complete tasks of varying difficulty. Using Quest Cards and hunting for wildcard bonuses, teams aim for the highest score within 45 minutes to win this points-based competition.
fields.longDescription:
Team size - 2
Duration - 45 to 60 mins

A team-based challenge where players complete movie-themed tasks across hidden booths. Each completed task earns points based on difficulty. Quest cards guide teams through the game, with wildcard challenges offering bonus points. The team with the highest score in 45 minutes wins.


1. Each booth offers tasks of difficulty, Easy (1 point) - Medium (3 points) - Hard (5 points) 
2. Completion of each task is to be reported to the Taskmaster booth.
3. After each task, teams receive a Quest Card leading to the next booth. Teams can only do one task per booth.
4. Wildcard challenges are hidden across the venue; completing them earns bonus points.
5. The team with the highest total score at the end of 45 minutes wins. In case of a tie, a sudden death task decides the winner.

For instance, consider a Marvel themed Booth... So, the Quest card would say something like:
"Multiple timelines are overlapping, and key events are out of place. The TVA has gone silent. You must intervene.”
In the booth the challenges would be smt like:

fields.shortDescription: Teams navigate a giant board game by rolling dice and completing various dares mapped to specific squares. This interactive challenge requires active participation and teamwork, with the first group to reach the final square declared winners.
fields.longDescription: Dare Dashers is a team-based interactive event centered around a dice-driven board game format. Participants advance along a numbered path by rolling a large dice and moving forward according to the value obtained. The game path consists of multiple squares, some of which are mapped to specific categories of dares. When a team lands on such a square, they are required to complete the assigned task as per the rules of that category before continuing. The tasks vary in nature and are designed to maintain active participation throughout the event. The game proceeds until a team reaches the final square on the board, which marks the completion of the event.

fields.shortDescription: Campus Quest is a fantasy-themed treasure hunt using imaginative maps. Teams navigate landmarks turned into castles or volcanoes to find checkpoints, complete side quests, and collect coordinate fragments to discover the final treasure.
fields.longDescription:
Campus Quest is an immersive treasure hunt where teams explore a fantasy-styled version of the campus using creatively morphed maps. Buildings and landmarks appear as volcanoes, oceans, castles, and other imaginative terrains, making navigation engaging and challenging. Each map contains five main checkpoints marked with an “X.” Reaching a checkpoint grants points, provides an official seal, and unlocks side quests available in that region. Each checkpoint also gives one fragment of the coordinates needed to discover the final treasure location.

Side quests are optional competitive challenges where two teams face off for bonus points, encouraging strategy and interaction. After collecting all coordinate fragments, teams race to the final location to earn high-value points that determine their final standing.

The event promotes teamwork, problem-solving, creativity, and campus exploration while offering an exciting, story-driven adventure experience for all participants

fields.eventName: The Case Files – A Murder Mystery Challenge
fields.shortDescription: The Case Files is an interactive murder mystery where teams act as investigators. Analyze evidence like letters and clippings to uncover motives and timelines. Solve the crime through logic and teamwork to find the culprit and win.
fields.longDescription:
Overview:
The Case Files is an interactive murder-mystery event where teams act as investigative units tasked with solving a fictional crime. Each team receives a detailed case folder containing letters, newspaper clippings, journal entries, objects, and other evidence fragments.

Mechanics:
Teams analyze every document to uncover connections, motives, timelines, and inconsistencies.

As they propose deductions or answer key questions, they unlock additional evidence files that reveal deeper layers of the case.

Progress depends entirely on the accuracy of their deductions, encouraging careful reasoning and teamwork.

Objective:
Teams must reconstruct what happened, identify the culprit, and provide a coherent explanation of the crime based on the evidence trail. The team with the most accurate and complete deduction wins.

fields.shortDescription: Teams compete in a classroom-based escape room to solve a sequence of puzzles within a strict time limit. This challenge tests logical reasoning and coordination as participants race to find the final key and exit before time runs out.
fields.longDescription: Emergency Exit 3.0 is a team-based escape room event conducted within a closed classroom environment. Participants compete in small teams, with multiple teams playing at the same time. The room contains a sequence of clues and puzzles that must be identified and solved to progress. Teams work within a fixed time limit to locate the final key or solution required to exit the room. The event follows a structured rule set and is designed around problem-solving, logical reasoning, and coordinated team effort.

fields.shortDescription: In this 45-minute social deduction game, Crew members complete puzzles while trying to identify hidden Killers. Featuring special roles like Doctor and Policeman, the game emphasizes strategy and teamwork to survive or eliminate the opposition.
fields.longDescription:
Objective:
Crew wins by completing all tasks or voting out both killers.
Killers win by eliminating enough players to stop tasks.

Tasks:
5 simple tasks (puzzles, riddles, clue finding). 2–3 players per task. Safe areas only.

Kills:
Killers show a Kill Card. No kills in task zones, washrooms, or crowded areas.

Powers:
Doctor – revive 1 player (once, within 10 min).
Policeman – check 2 players (during meetings).
Captain – cancel 1 wrong vote.

Meetings:
Max 2, 3 min discussion, compulsory voting.

Time: 45 minutes.
Rules: No rock climbing, running, or physical contact.

fields.shortDescription: DudePerfect Football Edition is a solo challenge where players test their skills by shooting goals from various angles and positions. For a small fee, participants can showcase their precision and accuracy in this thrilling, fast-paced event.
fields.longDescription: DudePerfect Football Edition – A thrilling individual challenge where participants must shoot the football into the goal from different angles and positions. The registration fee is ₹49, making it a fun and skill-testing event for solo players.

fields.shortDescription: Shipwreck is an interactive philosophy-inspired event featuring puzzles and ethical dilemmas. Teams navigate activity stations based on their logical and moral choices, creating a unique path toward the finish line in this role-playing journey.
fields.longDescription: Shipwreck is an interactive, philosophy-inspired event where participants progress through a series of activity stations, each presenting a brain, math, or philosophical puzzle. Based on their responses to ethical dilemmas and logical clues, teams move to different tables, tracing a unique path toward the finish line. The experience draws from classic moral thought experiments, encouraging reflection on choice, responsibility, and decision-making under constraints. Designed like a role-playing journey, the event combines problem-solving with self-discovery and philosophical insight in an engaging, game-based format.

fields.shortDescription: Capture memories at the Polaroid Photobooth! Choose solo or group shots with themed backdrops and props. This organized experience features instant prints and professional lighting to ensure a seamless and memorable session for all.
fields.longDescription: The Polaroid Photobooth will provide participants with instant printed Polaroid photos, offering both solo and group options. The booth setup includes a themed backdrop, props, lighting, and a payment desk. Participants will first be guided to the payment counter, where they select their photo type and receive a token. A queue manager ensures smooth flow while the photographer assists with posing and captures the shots. Prints are carefully developed and handed over by a dedicated volunteer. Throughout the event, the team will track film usage, manage crowds, and maintain equipment safety. The workflow ensures fast processing, organized coordination, and a memorable photo experience for all visitors.

fields.shortDescription: This philosophy-based debate competition utilizes the Socratic method to examine ethics, justice, and authority. With turncoat rounds and critical analysis, participants are judged on their logical reasoning and defensive arguments.
fields.longDescription: This event is a philosophy-based debate competition inspired by the Socratic method. Participants engage in structured discussions that encourage questioning assumptions, defending ethical viewpoints, and examining concepts such as justice, democracy, and authority. The format includes turncoat rounds, where speakers switch positions, and short ice-breaker activities to promote critical thinking and engagement. Emphasis is placed on logical reasoning, clarity of argument, and thoughtful analysis rather than consensus, with judgments based on the strength and coherence of reasoning presented.

fields.shortDescription: Mission Apollo is a space-themed escape room where teams solve puzzles and decode signals to restore failing systems. Participants must work together under pressure to escape their spacecraft, testing analytical thinking and communication skills.
fields.longDescription: Mission Apollo: The Last Exit is an immersive, space-themed room escape where participants will test their intelligence, teamwork, and problem-solving skills to operate under pressure. On a critical Apollo mission, the crew faced a sudden system failure, leaving them locked inside the spacecraft. With time running out, teams must work together to decode signals, navigate intricate mazes, solve space-inspired puzzles, and restore vital systems to ensure their safe return to Earth. The escape room is specially designed to simulate a real space mission environment filled with cryptic clues, emergency protocols, and mission-critical challenges that require logical reasoning and quick decision-making. The event promotes collaboration, analytical thinking, and good communication skills with an engaging mix of learning and entertainment. Mission Apollo: The Last Exit is an experience that promises you more than you bargained for; it is hands-on, with every second counting, and only the sharpest teams will make it out on time.

fields.shortDescription: Join a light painting workshop starting at 1:00 PM. Learn long-exposure techniques and use vibrant light sticks to create art. Participants take home a personalized photo and the skills to produce beautiful light-based imagery.
fields.longDescription:
The event kicks off at 1:00 PM with an introduction to the art of Light Painting Photography, where they’ll have a session to learn camera settings, light tools, and long-exposure techniques. 
Various kinds of techniques will be taught using vibrant and multicolored light sticks and some live demonstrations will be shown too. After the session, at 2:00 PM, participants will head over to take their very own personalized light painted pictures, featuring any stylized shape they want. They’ll walk away with a photo of their own, and the knowledge to make beautiful light paintings.

fields.shortDescription: This detective-themed treasure hunt challenges teams to solve a campus crime by chasing clues and gathering evidence. By solving puzzles at various locations, participants narrow down suspects to identify the culprit in a race against others.
fields.longDescription: This event is a detective-themed treasure hunt where students work in teams to solve a crime by chasing clues across the college campus. Participants will move through different locations, collecting evidence and solving simple puzzles that lead them to the next clue. Each piece of evidence helps teams narrow down suspects by collecting more and more clues and get closer to identifying the culprit.

fields.shortDescription: Teams showcase creative acts like dance, music, or drama. After judge critiques and audience cheers, winners are chosen based on scores and crowd response. This event celebrates diverse cultural roots through artistic expression and teamwork.
fields.longDescription: Battle of Culture is a friendly performance face-off where creativity meets fun. The event kicks off with a short introduction of the participants and a quick audience warm-up to set the mood. Each team or performer then takes the stage to present their act—this could be dance, music, drama, or any art form that represents their cultural roots or personal style.After every performance, the judges share brief comments, and the audience gets a chance to cheer for their favorites. Once all acts have performed, there’s a short break before the final results. The judges’ scores and crowd response decide who takes home the prize money.The evening wraps up with a light-hearted closing segment, celebrating all participants and the diverse cultures they bring together. It’s an event about expression, teamwork, and enjoying art in its many forms.

fields.shortDescription: This unpredictable general knowledge quiz by VIT Chennai’s Quiz Club covers global news, tech, and pop culture. Participants face fast-paced rounds featuring history and viral trends, testing their quick reactions and broad knowledge in a high-energy, co
fields.longDescription:
Get ready for a quiz that pulls questions from every corner of the world and every corner of the internet. Everything, Everywhere, All at Once is a fast, fun and unpredictable general knowledge event that mixes international news, science, sports, pop culture, history, tech, entertainment and even a bit of hot gossip.

If it happened, trended, went viral, or made people talk, it might show up here. The rounds are designed to keep everyone on their toes, with a mix of serious questions, light moments and a few surprises to keep the energy high.

Whether you follow global affairs, binge movies, scroll through social media all day, or simply love random facts, this quiz has something for you. Bring your best thinking, your quickest reactions and a team that can keep up with the chaos.

Everything, Everywhere, All at Once
Presented by the Quiz Club of VIT Chennai.

fields.shortDescription: Quizzipedia, presented by VIT Chennai’s Quiz Club, is a fast-paced quiz dedicated to internet culture. From viral memes and Wikipedia rabbit holes to niche tech lore, it challenges digital citizens to showcase their knowledge of the online world’s most f
fields.longDescription:
Welcome to Quizzipedia, a quiz built for the modern internet explorer. This event dives into everything that makes the online world chaotic, funny, surprising and endlessly fascinating.

Expect questions inspired by viral moments, deep Wikipedia rabbit holes, forgotten fandom lore, brainrot memes, internet history, niche communities, tech culture and all the obscure trivia you only learn at 3 a.m. while scrolling. If the internet has touched it, confused it or obsessed over it, Quizzipedia will probably cover it.

The rounds are fast, unpredictable and packed with references that only true internet citizens will understand. Whether you live on Reddit, binge YouTube documentaries, fall into Wikipedia spirals, collect memes, or just know way too much random information, this quiz is designed for you.

Quizzipedia celebrates everything the internet has created, ruined or made weird.
Join in for a fun and chaotic trip across the digital universe.

Quizzipedia: The Internet Quiz
Presented by the Quiz Club of VIT Chennai.

fields.shortDescription: This story-driven treasure hunt tasks investigators with solving the murder of Detective Raghav Verma. By decoding cryptic riddles and exploring campus, teams evaluate suspects and uncover truths inspired by real-world global criminal paradoxes.
fields.longDescription:
The Last Clue Bleeds is a live, story-driven treasure hunt blended with a murder mystery.
Detective Raghav Verma, a man feared and respected for his ruthless pursuit of justice, is found dead in his office. Six suspects. No direct interrogations. Only cryptic riddles, symbolic evidence, and hidden locations scattered across the campus.

Participants step into the shoes of investigators. Each riddle leads to a new location inspired by real-world criminal paradoxes across global cities. Every solved clue not only unlocks the next destination but also casts suspicion on a different suspect, forcing teams to constantly reassess the truth.

fields.shortDescription: Two teams of three compete by singing songs containing a specific word. Use green cards to perform and red cards to challenge opponents. Earn points for correct lyrics and valid challenges across knockout rounds in this musical face-off.
fields.longDescription:
At the center sits a POPC member with a timer and a displayed word. Two teams of three players each face one another from opposite tables, ready to react. Each team receives a green card and a red card.

When a word is announced, a team that knows a song containing that word raises the green card and must sing the lyric aloud. A correct song earns +1 point. If the opposing team believes the answer is incorrect, they may challenge using the red card. If the challenge is valid, the challengers gain +2 points. If incorrect, they lose 1 point.

Matches progress through knockout rounds including semifinals and finals. Regular rounds play to 5 or 7 points, while the final goes up to 10 points. Singing is mandatory. A POPC member maintains the live score, and microphones are provided for clear performance.

fields.shortDescription: Desi Arcade is a vibrant, student-led event featuring nostalgic childhood games like musical chairs and snakes & ladders. With handmade decor and high campus engagement, it offers a creative space for friends to compete, relive memories, and boost univer
fields.longDescription: Desi Arcade is a vibrant, crowd-pulling event where students jump into fun, interactive old-school childhood games like musical chairs, table-top challenges, giant snakes & ladders, and more. Our club designs and builds all the décor and game setups ourselves, giving the event a unique, handmade feel. Over the past two years, Desi Arcade has consistently drawn huge footfall, attracting students from across the campus as they pass through AB3. It’s an open, lively space where friends gather, relive nostalgia, compete, and enjoy quick, engaging activities. Although the registration fee is minimal, the high participation comfortably covers the event costs. Desi Arcade not only boosts campus energy but also showcases our club’s creativity and teamwork

fields.shortDescription: This All India Level Inter-Collegiate Women's Volleyball tournament follows AIU rules to foster teamwork, coordination, and fair play among college teams in a competitive environment.
fields.longDescription: The Women’s Volleyball event is a team competition conducted at the All India Level Inter-Collegiate Tournament. Matches will be played strictly as per Association of Indian Universities (AIU) rules and regulations, promoting teamwork, coordination, and fair play.

fields.shortDescription: This Men's Hockey 5s team event at the All India Level follows AIU rules. Open to students nationwide, it uses official formats and scoring, emphasizing sportsmanship, discipline, and high-level performance in every tournament match.
fields.longDescription: The Men’s Hockey (5-a-side) event is conducted as part of the All India Level Inter-Collegiate Tournament. The competition is a team event open to eligible students representing colleges and universities from across the country, as per Association of Indian Universities (AIU) eligibility norms. Matches will be played strictly in accordance with AIU rules and regulations for Hockey 5s, following the prescribed match format, scoring system, and disciplinary guidelines

fields.shortDescription: This Women's Throwball team competition at the All India Level follows AIU rules. The event emphasizes coordinated play and discipline, encouraging teams to compete fairly while representing their institutions with integrity and high skill.
fields.longDescription: The Women’s Throwball event is a team competition conducted at the All India Level Inter-Collegiate Tournament. The event will follow Association of Indian Universities (AIU)-prescribed rules and guidelines, promoting coordinated team play, fair competition, and sports discipline.

fields.shortDescription: This Men's Basketball All India Level competition focuses on skill, tactics, and sportsmanship. Teams from various institutions compete under AIU rules, ensuring a high-standard environment that highlights strategic execution and discipline.
fields.longDescription: The Men’s Basketball event is a team-based competition held at the All India Level Inter-Collegiate Tournament. Teams representing various institutions will compete under Association of Indian Universities (AIU) rules and regulations, focusing on skill execution, tactical play, and sportsmanship.

fields.shortDescription: The Women's Handball event is an All India Level Inter-Collegiate team competition. Matches follow AIU rules, focusing on technical skill. It provides a platform for teams to show coordinated efforts and sportsmanship in a fair environment.
fields.longDescription: The Women’s Handball event is organized as a team competition at the All India Level Inter-Collegiate Tournament. Matches will be conducted as per Association of Indian Universities (AIU) rules, emphasizing teamwork, technical skills, and adherence to official regulations.

fields.shortDescription: Document the four-day fest in the 20-Second Reel Challenge. Create and edit a single reel capturing the vibrant vibe and pro-shows. Entries are judged on creativity, with winners featured on the official Instagram page.
fields.longDescription: The 20-Second Reel Challenge invites participants to document Vibrance and Pro-Show events across all four days through short-form video content. Following an initial briefing and theme reveal, participants curate, edit, and submit a single reel. Winning entries are featured on the official Instagram page, encouraging creative storytelling, consistent engagement, and digital outreach. The submissions will be based on the following criteria: Creativity & originality, Cinematic quality, Transitions & flow, Storytelling, Fest vibe capture, Overall impact.

fields.shortDescription: Capture memories at the Polaroid Photobooth! Choose solo or group shots with themed backdrops and props. This organized experience features instant prints and professional lighting to ensure a seamless and memorable session for all.
fields.longDescription: The Polaroid Photobooth will provide participants with instant printed Polaroid photos, offering both solo and group options. The booth setup includes a themed backdrop, props, lighting, and a payment desk. Participants will first be guided to the payment counter, where they select their photo type and receive a token. A queue manager ensures smooth flow while the photographer assists with posing and captures the shots. Prints are carefully developed and handed over by a dedicated volunteer. Throughout the event, the team will track film usage, manage crowds, and maintain equipment safety. The workflow ensures fast processing, organized coordination, and a memorable photo experience for all visitors.

fields.shortDescription: This event blends modern energy with Odisha’s soul through Sambalpuri-fused jam sessions and Odissi-inspired folk dances. Featuring 'Khati'-style games, it offers a unique celebration where tradition meets trend for a joyful experience.
fields.longDescription:
The proposed event will be a vibrant spectacle, perfectly blending modern energy with the timeless soul of Odisha. The atmosphere is set to ignite during pulsating jamming sessions, where contemporary tunes will fuse with the infectious, foot-tapping beats of Sambalpuri rhythms, creating an electric musical dialogue that resonates with every heart.

Following the music, the stage will come alive with dynamic dance performances. These acts will showcase a stunning duality, marrying the sophisticated grace of Odissi-inspired movements with the raw, high-energy vigor of local folk styles.

To ensure maximum engagement, we will feature iconic, eye-catching games and challenges. Designed to evoke the warmth and laughter of a lively 'Khati', these activities will spark friendly competition and community spirit. It promises to be an unforgettable celebration where tradition meets trend, ensuring every attendee experiences pure maja.

fields.shortDescription: Satyaneshi is a Bengali-themed treasure hunt blending mystery, logic, and culture. Teams solve clues and use problem-solving skills to navigate a thrilling journey. Wit and teamwork are the keys to uncovering the final truth in this quest.
fields.longDescription: Satyaneshi– The Quest for Truth is an engaging Bengali-themed treasure hunt that challenges participants to think, explore, and uncover hidden clues on a journey toward the truth. Blending mystery, logic, and cultural elements, the event encourages teamwork, observation, and problem-solving at every step. Each clue leads closer to the final discovery, making the experience both exciting and intellectually stimulating. Designed to spark curiosity and adventure, Satyaneshi offers participants a thrilling hunt where wit and wisdom are the keys to success.

fields.shortDescription: Mehndi Maharani offers a cultural experience featuring professional henna artistry and a handicraft stall. Visitors can receive intricate live mehndi designs while exploring unique, handmade products that showcase traditional artistic talent.
fields.longDescription:
Event–Mehndi Maharani
Event brings a vibrant cultural experience with Mehndi Maharani, featuring a professional mehndi artist along with a beautifully curated handicraft stall. The stall offers intricate mehndi designs and unique handcrafted products that reflect traditional artistry. Visitors can enjoy live mehndi application, explore handmade items, and immerse themselves in rich cultural creativity throughout the day.

fields.shortDescription: This philosophy-based debate competition utilizes the Socratic method to examine ethics, justice, and authority. With turncoat rounds and critical analysis, participants are judged on their logical reasoning and defensive arguments.
fields.longDescription: This event is a philosophy-based debate competition inspired by the Socratic method. Participants engage in structured discussions that encourage questioning assumptions, defending ethical viewpoints, and examining concepts such as justice, democracy, and authority. The format includes turncoat rounds, where speakers switch positions, and short ice-breaker activities to promote critical thinking and engagement. Emphasis is placed on logical reasoning, clarity of argument, and thoughtful analysis rather than consensus, with judgments based on the strength and coherence of reasoning presented.

fields.shortDescription: Shipwreck is an interactive philosophy-inspired event featuring puzzles and ethical dilemmas. Teams navigate activity stations based on their logical and moral choices, creating a unique path toward the finish line in this role-playing journey.
fields.longDescription: Shipwreck is an interactive, philosophy-inspired event where participants progress through a series of activity stations, each presenting a brain, math, or philosophical puzzle.
