Based on their responses to ethical dilemmas and logical clues, teams move to different tables, tracing a unique path toward the finish line. The experience draws from classic moral thought experiments, encouraging reflection on choice, responsibility, and decision-making under constraints. Designed like a role-playing journey, the event combines problem-solving with self-discovery and philosophical insight in an engaging, game-based format.

fields.shortDescription: In this role-playing game, participants act as unique characters in a shipwreck scenario. They must convince a judge why they deserve to live or die, switching stances on command. Quick thinking and staying in character are vital to victory.
fields.longDescription: Each participant is assigned a unique character and given a stick-face mask that brings the role to life. It starts off as a game of shipwreck. The goal is to convince the judge or audience why your character deserves to survive and be saved from the shipwreck. Participants are given a short time to speak, during which they must think quickly, stay in character, and present logical, emotional, or humorous arguments. When the judge calls out “Shazam!” or uses a buzzer, participants must switch gears to Anti-Shipwreck or switch back to shipwreck, depending on the call. In anti-shipwreck, participants must speak in character and present reasons explaining why they are the least suitable to survive the situation. The participant must stay true to their character throughout the game regardless of the stance they are arguing for.  Ultimately, the judge decides which characters “survive” and are handed the life jacket, and which are “thrown overboard”.

fields.shortDescription: CODE RED is a Youth Red Cross escape room event where teams navigate emergency scenarios. Participants solve clues and make rapid decisions regarding first aid and disaster preparedness to complete challenges before time runs out.
fields.longDescription: CODE RED is an exciting escape room–style event by the Youth Red Cross where teams step into a simulated emergency scenario and race against time to save the day. You’ll crack clues, make quick decisions, and work together to complete challenges related to first aid, health awareness, and disaster preparedness.

fields.shortDescription: Ground Zero is a high-stakes tournament featuring general knowledge clashes, SDG puzzles, and escape room scenarios. Hosted by the Women Development Cell, it blends adrenaline-fueled competition with vital discussions on gender equality and empowerment.
fields.longDescription:
Ground Zero erupts as the ultimate battleground for brains, bravado, and breakneck escapes! Hosted by the Women Development Cell, this pulse-pounding knockout tournament unleashes solo showdowns and duo duels fueled by rapid-fire general knowledge clashes, Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) brain-benders, and heart-racing escape room scenarios.

Picture this: time-locked chambers where every second counts—crack cryptic puzzles, outsmart high-stakes riddles, and blast through immersive traps under crushing countdowns, all while forging unbreakable bonds or unleashing solo fury to survive eliminations.

Beyond the adrenaline overload, Ground Zero sparks fierce conversations on gender equality, equal opportunities, and collective empowerment, transforming rivals into revolutionaries for a bolder world.

fields.shortDescription: Inspired by the "Reign of Terror," teams must identify a secret spy while completing tasks for points. Captains use clues to find the traitor, navigating enemy factions and safe zones in this strategic, revolutionary-themed game.
fields.longDescription:
Our event is inspired by Maximilien Robespierre’s “Reign of Terror,” where participants play revolutionaries attempting to overthrow him in a strategic team-based game. Each team consists of four members: one captain and three soldiers, among whom one is secretly a spy from Robespierre’s Ghost Agents tasked with eliminating the entire team.

The captain’s role is to identify and eliminate the spy within a fixed time limit. Only the captain can make this decision, based on clues provided and team discussions held only at designated checkpoints. Teams must also complete tasks to earn points, which are required to hand over the spy. Rule violations lead to point deductions, and repeated violations result in disqualification.

Teams are divided into allied and enemy factions, with some tasks requiring cooperation between allies. Enemy teams may eliminate one opposing member after earning sufficient points. National Guards mark safe zones where eliminations are prohibited. Winners are determined by points and successful identification of the spy.

fields.shortDescription: This high-intensity escape room, inspired by Punjab’s heritage, challenges teams to solve handcrafted puzzles and logic tasks. Within fifteen minutes, participants must unlock mechanisms and collect symbolic keys to successfully navigate the storyline.
fields.longDescription:
A high-intensity escape room built entirely from scratch, inspired by Punjab’s rich structure, symbols, and problem-solving traditions.
Teams have 15 minutes to crack handcrafted puzzles, solve logic challenges, and unlock mechanisms to collect 10 symbolic cards/keys woven into a Punjab-structured storyline.
Only teams that think fast, work smart, and adapt quickly will make it out.

fields.shortDescription: Debate Arena – Voices of Today is a student debate on whether convenience culture has weakened youth mentally, exploring technology, instant gratification, and resilience while building public speaking, critical thinking, and confidence.
fields.longDescription: Debate Arena -  Voices of Today provides a platform for students to express, question, and critically examine contemporary social issues. The debate theme, “Has convenience culture made today’s youth mentally weaker?”, invites participants to analyze the impact of instant gratification, technology, and comfort-driven lifestyles on mental resilience and problem-solving abilities. Participants will present arguments both for and against the motion, encouraging balanced thinking and healthy discussion. The event aims to enhance public speaking skills, logical reasoning, and confidence while promoting respectful exchange of diverse perspectives. Judges will evaluate participants based on clarity of thought, relevance of points, evidence, delivery, and rebuttal skills. This event encourages awareness, critical thinking, and informed opinions among students, making it an engaging and intellectually stimulating experience for the audience as well.

fields.shortDescription: BoxCricket is a fast-paced cricket event held in a compact arena, featuring teams of five main players and three substitutes. With a registration fee of ₹199, it provides an accessible and exciting competitive environment for all cricket enthusiasts.
fields.longDescription: BoxCricket – A fast-paced cricket event played in a compact arena. Each team consists of 5 main players and 3 substitutes, ensuring flexibility and strategy. The registration fee is ₹199, making it an accessible and exciting competition for all cricket enthusiasts.

fields.shortDescription: The DudePerfect Basketball Edition is an individual challenge focused on precision and creativity. For a fee of ₹50, participants must demonstrate their shooting skills by hitting the hoop from various challenging angles and positions.
fields.longDescription: DudePerfect Basketball Edition – An exciting individual challenge where participants must shoot the basketball into the hoop from different angles and positions. The registration fee is ₹50, and it’s strictly an individual event, testing precision and creativity in every throw.

fields.shortDescription: MADHOUSE is a high-energy team challenge featuring surprise tasks revealed on the spot. From physical games to quick-thinking puzzles, teams must adapt and coordinate to earn points. It is a fun, inclusive event focused on teamwork.
fields.longDescription: MADHOUSE is a high-energy, fun-filled team event designed to test coordination, creativity, and adaptability through unpredictable challenges. Teams face a series of surprise tasks revealed on the spot, ranging from physical coordination games and blindfold challenges to quick-thinking and communication-based activities. No prior skills or preparation are required—success depends purely on teamwork, presence of mind, and enthusiasm. Each round earns teams points based on task completion, creativity, and overall performance. With constant twists and humorous challenges, MADHOUSE ensures continuous engagement for both participants and the audience, making it an exciting and inclusive campus event.

fields.shortDescription: Mission Apollo is a space-themed escape room where teams solve puzzles and decode signals to restore failing systems. Participants must work together under pressure to escape their spacecraft, testing analytical thinking and communication skills.
fields.longDescription: Mission Apollo: The Last Exit is an immersive, space-themed room escape where participants will test their intelligence, teamwork, and problem-solving skills to operate under pressure. On a critical Apollo mission, the crew faced a sudden system failure, leaving them locked inside the spacecraft. With time running out, teams must work together to decode signals, navigate intricate mazes, solve space-inspired puzzles, and restore vital systems to ensure their safe return to Earth. The escape room is specially designed to simulate a real space mission environment filled with cryptic clues, emergency protocols, and mission-critical challenges that require logical reasoning and quick decision-making. The event promotes collaboration, analytical thinking, and good communication skills with an engaging mix of learning and entertainment. Mission Apollo: The Last Exit is an experience that promises you more than you bargained for; it is hands-on, with every second counting, and only the sharpest teams will make it out on time.

fields.shortDescription: Secret Agenda is an interactive game of deception and strategy played in pairs. Teams use logic and storytelling to uncover truths or hide information, while the audience actively participates by spotting lies and voting on the most successful performanc
fields.longDescription:
Secret Agenda is a round-wise, interactive game designed around deception, strategy, and communication. Played in teams of two, the event challenges participants to speak convincingly, hide information, and uncover the truth using logic, storytelling, and physical props.

Across multiple rounds, teams face unique challenges: defending sealed statements using props, identifying lies through questioning across a barrier, solving questions with limited clues, and spotting false evidence presented as truth. In every round, one player knows more than the other, creating tension and mind-games that test trust, observation, and persuasion.

The audience plays an active role throughout by guessing outcomes, spotting inconsistencies, and voting on successful deception, making them insiders rather than passive viewers. With a balance of thinking and performance, Secret Agenda offers intelligent, engaging fun without cringe.

fields.shortDescription: As a signature FYI event, InFYInite is designed to inform, involve, and inspire students. It celebrates originality and unconventional thinking through a dynamic blend of creative challenges, problem-solving, and collaborative activities.
fields.longDescription: InFYInite is one of FYI’s signature events designed to Inform, Involve, and Inspire students through a dynamic blend of creativity, problem-solving, and teamwork. InFYInite focuses on unconventional thinking and celebrates originality.

fields.shortDescription: A collaboration between TEDx VIT Chennai, History TV18, and the UN, this event features a series of insightful talks. Experts and speakers share powerful ideas and perspectives aimed at shaping the future and understanding our modern world.
fields.longDescription: A collaborative event between TEDX VIT CHENNAI, History TV18, City of Kitchener and United Nations where we will be having a series  of talks that shape the modern world.

fields.shortDescription: Teams navigate a fracturing multiverse to solve Sherlock’s murder by identifying the one true reality. Through puzzles, decoding, and time travel, participants gather clues to catch the killer before the timelines completely collapse.
fields.longDescription:
Sherlock exists across multiple parallel realities. When the multiverse fractures, he is found dead in every universe and each death an echo of a single, true crime. Only one universe holds the real murder. The rest are distortions created by collapsing timelines.

Teams must travel across these universes, each governed by different rules, challenges, and truths. As realities overlap and time itself destabilizes, participants gather fragmented clues about the killer, the weapon, and the world by eliminating false paths to uncover the one reality where the crime truly occurred.

Challenges include logic and tech puzzles, audio-based decoding, visual illusion tasks, hands-on team activities, and chaos relay featuring elements like Morse-code walk, riddle resolutions,sabotage cards, etc.

A limited time-travel window allows teams to revisit the past, alter their deductions, and gain critical insights before the multiverse collapses completely.

A high-intensity, story-driven mystery that blends multiverse chaos, strategic deduction, and immersive gameplay.

fields.shortDescription: Teams showcase creative acts like dance, music, or drama. After judge critiques and audience cheers, winners are chosen based on scores and crowd response. This event celebrates diverse cultural roots through artistic expression and teamwork.
fields.longDescription: Battle of Culture is a friendly performance face-off where creativity meets fun. The event kicks off with a short introduction of the participants and a quick audience warm-up to set the mood. Each team or performer then takes the stage to present their act—this could be dance, music, drama, or any art form that represents their cultural roots or personal style.After every performance, the judges share brief comments, and the audience gets a chance to cheer for their favorites. Once all acts have performed, there’s a short break before the final results. The judges’ scores and crowd response decide who takes home the prize money.The evening wraps up with a light-hearted closing segment, celebrating all participants and the diverse cultures they bring together. It’s an event about expression, teamwork, and enjoying art in its many forms.

fields.shortDescription: Teams navigate a giant board game by rolling dice and completing various dares mapped to specific squares. This interactive challenge requires active participation and teamwork, with the first group to reach the final square declared winners.
fields.longDescription: Dare Dashers is a team-based interactive event centered around a dice-driven board game format. Participants advance along a numbered path by rolling a large dice and moving forward according to the value obtained. The game path consists of multiple squares, some of which are mapped to specific categories of dares. When a team lands on such a square, they are required to complete the assigned task as per the rules of that category before continuing. The tasks vary in nature and are designed to maintain active participation throughout the event. The game proceeds until a team reaches the final square on the board, which marks the completion of the event.

fields.shortDescription: This powerlifting competition tests raw strength through the squat, bench press, and deadlift. Open to all, athletes compete in specific weight categories. Judging focuses on maximum strength and proper technique to find the strongest human.
fields.longDescription:
STRONGEST HUMAN  VITC
Strongest Human  VITC is a powerlifting competition conducted by the Fitness Club, VIT Chennai, designed to test raw strength, discipline, and mental grit. The event features the three core powerlifting lifts — Squat, Bench Press, and Deadlift.

The competition is open to both internal and external participants and will be conducted under different weight categories to ensure fair and competitive lifting. Athletes will be judged based on maximum strength and proper lifting technique across all three lifts.

This event celebrates true power, consistency, and the spirit of competitive fitness.

fields.shortDescription: Embark on an exciting hunt where each clue leads to a new location. Participants must complete health and wellness tasks at every checkpoint to progress. The first individual or team to finish all challenges and reach the destination wins.
fields.longDescription: The  Hunt begins at a starting point where participants receive their first clue. Each clue leads them to a new location, where they must complete a health-related task to earn the next clue. This continues through multiple checkpoints, combining fun with fitness and wellness awareness. The participant or team that completes all tasks and reaches the final destination first wins the hunt.

fields.shortDescription: Teams of three to four represent contingents in this multi-sport event. Participants tackle various tech-friendly mini-challenges, earning points for speed and problem-solving. A leaderboard tracks progress as teams rotate through the arenas.
fields.longDescription:
The Olympics is a team-based event designed to recreate the excitement and structure of a multi-sport Olympic Games. Teams of 3–4 participants represent a single contingent and compete across a series of distinct mini tech-friendly challenges, each functioning as an independent challenge. These events are designed to test a balanced mix of speed, coordination, problem-solving, and teamwork.
Participants rotate across multiple event arenas, earning points based on performance and strategy, with cumulative scores tracked on a central leaderboard. Timed rounds, structured progression, and surprise elements ensure a dynamic and engaging experience throughout the competition.

fields.shortDescription: This immersive workshop introduces participants to the vibrant Lavani folk dance of Maharashtra. Guided by experts, attendees learn traditional footwork, expressions, and gestures, celebrating Marathi culture while building stage presence.
fields.longDescription: The Lavani Workshop is an immersive cultural experience that introduces participants to the vibrant and expressive folk dance form of Maharashtra. Known for its powerful rhythm, graceful movements, and emotive storytelling, Lavani blends music, expression, and energy into a captivating performance art. Guided by experienced performers, the workshop covers basic footwork, hand gestures, facial expressions, and an understanding of traditional costumes and music. Designed for beginners and enthusiasts alike, the session encourages participants to connect with Marathi culture while building confidence, coordination, and stage presence. The workshop celebrates the spirit, elegance, and timeless charm of Lavani.

fields.shortDescription: Teams celebrate India's culinary diversity by cooking assigned regional breakfast dishes from outside their own backgrounds. Using limited resources, they recreate authentic flavors from scratch. Judging is based on taste and teamwork.
fields.longDescription:
The Regional Breakfast Challenge is a unique cooking-based event designed to celebrate India’s rich culinary diversity. In this event, participating teams will be randomly assigned a traditional regional breakfast dish from India, such as Idli–Sambar, Poha, Upma, Paratha, Appam, or Dhokla. The key twist is that none of the team members will belong to the region from which the dish originates, encouraging participants to step outside their comfort zones.

Teams will be provided with basic ingredients and utensils, along with a limited preparation time. They must research, understand, and recreate the dish from scratch using only the resources provided. No prior practice or outside assistance will be allowed during the event. Participants will be judged on taste, authenticity, presentation, teamwork, and time management.

The event promotes cross-cultural learning, creativity, and collaboration, while giving students a hands-on experience of India’s culinary heritage. It also encourages adaptability and problem-solving under pressure, making it both educational and entertaining. The Regional Breakfast Challenge blends fun with learning, turning cooking into a vibrant cultural experience.

fields.shortDescription: This team challenge tests prompt engineering skills using LLMs. Teams must design a single prompt to solve diverse tasks like content generation and summarization. Evaluation is based on accuracy, creativity, and task completeness.
fields.longDescription: This is a team-based challenge that tests creativity, strategy, and prompt-design skills using large language models. Teams are given a set of diverse mini-tasks, including content generation, summarization, and creative problem-solving. The key constraint is that each team may use only one single prompt to interact with an LLM of their choice, which must be designed to handle all tasks without follow-up inputs. Entries are evaluated based on accuracy, creativity, completeness, and consistency across tasks. The team with the highest overall score is declared the winner.

fields.shortDescription: This story-driven treasure hunt tasks investigators with solving the murder of Detective Raghav Verma. By decoding cryptic riddles and exploring campus, teams evaluate suspects and uncover truths inspired by real-world global criminal paradoxes.
fields.longDescription:
The Last Clue Bleeds is a live, story-driven treasure hunt blended with a murder mystery.
Detective Raghav Verma, a man feared and respected for his ruthless pursuit of justice, is found dead in his office. Six suspects. No direct interrogations. Only cryptic riddles, symbolic evidence, and hidden locations scattered across the campus.

Participants step into the shoes of investigators. Each riddle leads to a new location inspired by real-world criminal paradoxes across global cities. Every solved clue not only unlocks the next destination but also casts suspicion on a different suspect, forcing teams to constantly reassess the truth.

fields.shortDescription: Experience the thrill of VALORANT in this intense tactical shooter competition. Teams must demonstrate strategic precision, communication, and clutch potential. Every round matters as players battle through the bracket to claim victory.
fields.longDescription:
Lock in, team up, and prove your aim.

VALORANT is our club’s competitive gaming event where strategy meets precision. Teams go head-to-head in intense tactical shooter matchups, testing communication, game sense, and clutch potential under pressure. Every round counts, every decision matters — from agent selection to the final spike defuse.

Whether you’re here to dominate the bracket or experience the thrill of competitive play, this event brings together gamers who respect the grind, the strategy, and the spirit of fair competition.

Only skill survives.
Only one team wins.

fields.shortDescription: Join Haryana Hood’s vibrant cultural mela featuring pottery, mehendi, and painting stalls. Enjoy games like gulel, lively music, and performances celebrating Haryana’s spirit through art, tradition, and student-led entertainment.
fields.longDescription: The cultural club Haryana Hood is organizing a vibrant mela celebrating art, tradition, and fun. The event will begin with the setup of colorful stalls, each offering a unique experience — from traditional pottery where visitors can try their hand at shaping clay, to creative mehendi and painting corners showcasing artistic talent. Alongside, exciting game stalls like gulel and darts will add a playful competitive spirit to the atmosphere. A lively music system will set the mood throughout the event, filling the air with energy and rhythm. Short performances by club members will keep the crowd entertained, adding a cultural flair to the celebration. Together, the combination of art, games, music, and performance will create a joyful and engaging experience, reflecting the vibrant spirit of Haryana and the enthusiasm of the students behind the event.

fields.shortDescription: Join this high-energy Punjabi twist on the classic Tambola game. Expect loud calls, desi humor, and nonstop crowd interaction. With unexpected twists and pure luck, it is a celebratory evening where numbers and friends come together.
fields.longDescription:
Get ready for a high-energy Punjabi twist on the classic Tambola game. This isn’t a silent, boring numbers session — it’s loud calls, desi humour, unexpected twists, and nonstop crowd interaction.

Every round brings new surprises, quick wins, and moments where luck decides everything. Whether you’re playing to win or just there for the vibe, the energy stays high and the fun doesn’t drop for a second.

Come with friends, shout your numbers, flex your luck, and enjoy an evening where numbers aren’t just called — they’re celebrated.

Luck shows up once.
Make sure you’re there when it does.

fields.eventName: Three to Tango | Sketch •  Guess • Design
fields.shortDescription: A unique reverse-Pictionary challenge for teams of three. One member describes a mystery object, the second identifies it, and the third replicates it using CAD or drawing tools. Success depends on clear communication and speed.
fields.longDescription:
One describes, one guesses, one designs—can your team recreate the object before time runs out?

Pictionary but make it UNO reverse! 
Teams of three take on the challenge. One member describes a mystery object—without saying its name. Another cracks the clue, while the third races against time to sketch or replicate it using CAD/Drawing.

fields.shortDescription: This debate event challenges students to argue environmental and sustainability topics. Participants present points for or against issues like climate change, followed by rebuttals. Judges evaluate speakers based on clarity and relevance.
fields.longDescription: This is a debate event conducted by the where students discuss and argue on topics related to the environment and sustainability. Participants will speak either in support of or against a given topic, such as climate change, pollution, or sustainable living. Each participant will get a fixed amount of time to present their points, followed by a short rebuttal or response. Judges will evaluate the participants based on how clearly they express their ideas, the relevance of their points, and their speaking skills.

fields.shortDescription: PrashnaManjusha celebrates Marathi literature and culture through interactive challenges. Explore Maharashtra’s legacy, from Bhakti poets to modern cinema. This event encourages participants to rediscover cultural gems and beauty.
fields.longDescription:
PrashnaManjusha is a vibrant celebration of Marathi literature and culture, curated to engage enthusiasts with the richness of Maharashtra’s legacy. This interactive event brings together stories, poetry, folk traditions, historical milestones, and iconic literary works that have shaped Marathi identity. Participants journey through centuries of creative expression, from the saint-poets of the Bhakti era to modern Marathi writers, theatre, cinema, and cultural customs that define everyday life.

Designed for learners, admirers, and the culturally curious, PrashnaManjusha offers a dynamic blend of thoughtful challenges, rapid-fire segments, and theme-based rounds. It encourages participants to rediscover forgotten gems, explore linguistic beauty, and appreciate the diversity of rituals, art forms, and regional influences across Maharashtra.

More than a competition, PrashnaManjusha aims to inspire pride in Marathi heritage and foster deeper connections with its timeless literature and cultural traditions, making it an enriching and memorable experience for all.

fields.shortDescription: Campus Quest is a fantasy-themed treasure hunt using imaginative maps. Teams navigate landmarks turned into castles or volcanoes to find checkpoints, complete side quests, and collect coordinate fragments to discover the final treasure.
fields.longDescription:
Campus Quest is an immersive treasure hunt where teams explore a fantasy-styled version of the campus using creatively morphed maps. Buildings and landmarks appear as volcanoes, oceans, castles, and other imaginative terrains, making navigation engaging and challenging. Each map contains five main checkpoints marked with an “X.” Reaching a checkpoint grants points, provides an official seal, and unlocks side quests available in that region. Each checkpoint also gives one fragment of the coordinates needed to discover the final treasure location.

Side quests are optional competitive challenges where two teams face off for bonus points, encouraging strategy and interaction. After collecting all coordinate fragments, teams race to the final location to earn high-value points that determine their final standing.

The event promotes teamwork, problem-solving, creativity, and campus exploration while offering an exciting, story-driven adventure experience for all participants

fields.shortDescription: Beaded Bonds is an interactive craft event where students design personalized friendship bracelets. Using provided materials, participants enjoy a relaxing, creative session that encourages connection, allowing friends to exchange handmade keepsakes whil
fields.longDescription: Beaded Bonds is an interactive, fun, craft-based event designed to encourage creativity, collaboration, and meaningful connection among students. The setup features organized trays of beads, threads, and accessories, allowing participants to design and create personalized friendship bracelets. Simple instruction cards will be provided to guide beginners through basic knotting and beading techniques, making sure the event is accessible to all. It encourages pairs or groups of friends to sit together, craft bracelets, and exchange them as a symbol of friendship. This event offers a relaxed, colorful, and engaging space where students can create keepsakes while building bonds.

fields.shortDescription: A flagship bodybuilding competition celebrating aesthetics, strength, and discipline. Participants from various institutions showcase muscle definition and symmetry. Judges evaluate stage presence and conditioning to promote a healthy fitness culture.
fields.longDescription:
Mr. Physique is a flagship bodybuilding competition organized by the Fitness Club to celebrate strength, aesthetics, discipline, and dedication to fitness. The event provides a competitive platform for both internal college students and external participants from other institutions and fitness communities to showcase their physique and training excellence.

The competition focuses on overall physique development, including muscle definition, symmetry, proportion, conditioning, and stage presence. Participants will be judged by a qualified panel following standard bodybuilding evaluation criteria to ensure fairness and professionalism.

Through Mr. Physique, the Fitness Club aims to promote a strong fitness culture on campus, encourage healthy competition, and inspire individuals to strive for physical and mental excellence. The event also offers participants valuable exposure, recognition, and competitive experience.

fields.shortDescription: Teams play interactive games that evolve through unexpected rule changes and disruptions. Success depends on adaptability and quick thinking as dynamics shift every few minutes, testing coordination and teamwork in a high-energy environment.
fields.longDescription:
GameShift is a fast-paced, interactive team-based event where participants play simple games that constantly evolve through unexpected rule changes. Teams are first briefed on a base game and its workflow. These base games can include activities like throwing a ball at a target, memory or pattern challenges, coordination-based tasks, or logic and strategy mini-games.

As the game progresses, periodic “disruptions” are introduced every few minutes, altering the rules, team dynamics, time limits, or communication methods. These disruptions force teams to quickly adapt, rethink strategies, and coordinate under pressure.

The focus of GameShift is not just winning, but demonstrating adaptability, creativity, and teamwork in a constantly changing environment. The event is designed to be fun, engaging, and accessible to all students, with minimal resources and maximum participation. By the end of the event, teams will have experienced multiple shifts in gameplay, making it a high-energy and memorable experience for both participants and spectators.

fields.shortDescription: In this movie-themed challenge, duos navigate hidden booths to complete tasks of varying difficulty. Using Quest Cards and hunting for wildcard bonuses, teams aim for the highest score within 45 minutes to win this points-based competition.
fields.longDescription:
Team size - 2
Duration - 45 to 60 mins

A team-based challenge where players complete movie-themed tasks across hidden booths. Each completed task earns points based on difficulty. Quest cards guide teams through the game, with wildcard challenges offering bonus points. The team with the highest score in 45 minutes wins.


1. Each booth offers tasks of difficulty, Easy (1 point) - Medium (3 points) - Hard (5 points) 
2. Completion of each task is to be reported to the Taskmaster booth.
3. After each task, teams receive a Quest Card leading to the next booth. Teams can only do one task per booth.
4. Wildcard challenges are hidden across the venue; completing them earns bonus points.
5. The team with the highest total score at the end of 45 minutes wins. In case of a tie, a sudden death task decides the winner.

For instance, consider a Marvel themed Booth... So, the Quest card would say something like:
"Multiple timelines are overlapping, and key events are out of place. The TVA has gone silent. You must intervene.”
In the booth the challenges would be smt like: 
Easy: Do a superhero pose and name 5 superheroes in 10 seconds.
Medium: Match 5 quotes to their Marvel characters.
Hard: Enact a short superhero fight scene using slow motion.

fields.shortDescription: Two teams of three compete by singing songs containing a specific word. Use green cards to perform and red cards to challenge opponents. Earn points for correct lyrics and valid challenges across knockout rounds in this musical face-off.
fields.longDescription:
At the center sits a POPC member with a timer and a displayed word. Two teams of three players each face one another from opposite tables, ready to react. Each team receives a green card and a red card.

When a word is announced, a team that knows a song containing that word raises the green card and must sing the lyric aloud. A correct song earns +1 point. If the opposing team believes the answer is incorrect, they may challenge using the red card. If the challenge is valid, the challengers gain +2 points. If incorrect, they lose 1 point.

Matches progress through knockout rounds including semifinals and finals. Regular rounds play to 5 or 7 points, while the final goes up to 10 points. Singing is mandatory. A POPC member maintains the live score, and microphones are provided for clear performance.

fields.shortDescription: In this 45-minute social deduction game, Crew members complete puzzles while trying to identify hidden Killers. Featuring special roles like Doctor and Policeman, the game emphasizes strategy and teamwork to survive or eliminate the opposition.
fields.longDescription:
Objective:
Crew wins by completing all tasks or voting out both killers.
Killers win by eliminating enough players to stop tasks.

Tasks:
5 simple tasks (puzzles, riddles, clue finding). 2–3 players per task. Safe areas only.

Kills:
Killers show a Kill Card. No kills in task zones, washrooms, or crowded areas.

Powers:
Doctor – revive 1 player (once, within 10 min).
Policeman – check 2 players (during meetings).
Captain – cancel 1 wrong vote.

Meetings:
Max 2, 3 min discussion, compulsory voting.

Time: 45 minutes.
Rules: No rock climbing, running, or physical contact.

fields.shortDescription: In this cosplay event, participants dress as assigned movie characters to perform on-the-spot scenes and a ramp walk. It tests acting skills and costume design, requiring participants to stay in character while engaging with the audience.
fields.longDescription: A cosplay event - participants will be allotted certain characters and they have to dress up as the character and on the spot any scene would be given and they have to act accordingly as per the movie character along with a ramp walk

fields.shortDescription: This event features an air-dry clay activity and live student-requested music. Attendees can enjoy a photo booth, thumbprint Polaroid station, and pani puri refreshments, making it a relaxing and creative hangout spot for everyone.
fields.longDescription: The event will have an air-dry clay activity as the main attraction, along with live music based on students’ requests. There will also be a photo booth, a thumbprint Polaroid activity, and pani puri served as refreshment, making it a fun and enjoyable hangout for everyone.

fields.eventName: Art for Change -  Painting & Drawing Competition
fields.shortDescription: Art for Change is a creative competition where participants use painting or drawing to address social issues like health and climate change. Artworks are judged on creativity and clarity, encouraging students to inspire action through art.
fields.longDescription: Art for Change is a creative platform that encourages participants to express their ideas and concerns about pressing social issues through painting and drawing. This edition focuses on themes of health awareness and climate change, allowing students to visually communicate messages that inspire reflection and action. Participants can use any medium, style, or technique to bring their concepts to life on paper or canvas. The artworks will be judged on creativity, originality, clarity of message, visual appeal, and relevance to the chosen theme. This event not only nurtures artistic talent but also raises awareness about important societal issues among participants and viewers alike. By combining art with meaningful social commentary, Art for Change aims to make participants think critically while providing an enjoyable and expressive experience.

fields.shortDescription: Players earn currency through campus mini-games to fund strategic Monopoly rounds. Leaderboard rankings depend on smart investments and risks, as unused cash does not carry over. It is a high-stakes blend of financial strategy and luck.
fields.longDescription:
Participants begin by exploring different zones on campus, competing in engaging mini-games to earn in-game currency based on their performance. This earned money becomes the key to unlocking Monopoly rounds, where players must make smart financial decisions—choosing how much to invest and when to take risks.

Each monopoly round rewards points depending on gameplay and strategy, and only these points contribute to the final leaderboard. Any unused cash or mini-game earnings don’t carry over, making every decision count. Once spent, money is gone—so careful planning and bold moves are essential.

The objective is simple yet challenging: climb the leaderboard by maximizing points through Monopoly rounds. With a perfect mix of skill, strategy, and luck, Monopoly Rush promises an unforgettable, high-energy competitive experience.

fields.shortDescription: Thanima is a premium cultural event celebrating diversity through music, dance, and fashion. It provides a platform for emerging campus artists to showcase their talents, fostering unity and inclusivity while honoring rich traditions and expressions.
fields.longDescription: Thanima proudly presents a premium cultural event designed to celebrate the vibrant diversity of traditions, art forms, and creative expressions present across the campus. This event serves as a dynamic platform that brings together students from varied cultural backgrounds, fostering unity through art, music, dance, fashion, and performance. Beyond celebration, the event is envisioned as an opportunity for upcoming artists to step into the spotlight and confidently exhibit their talent before a wider audience. By encouraging originality, innovation, and cultural pride, Thanima aims to nurture emerging performers and creators, helping them gain visibility and recognition. The event reflects the spirit of inclusivity and artistic excellence, creating an atmosphere where tradition meets modern expression. Through carefully curated performances and experiences, the showcase highlights the richness of cultural heritage while inspiring collaboration and mutual respect among participants. Ultimately, this premium event stands as a testament to Thanima’s commitment to empowering talent, preserving culture, and strengthening the cultural fabric of the campus.

fields.eventName: PLAYVERSE: The Ultimate Campus Game Arena
fields.shortDescription: PLAYVERSE is a campus gaming event where teams compete in fun, accessible mini-games. Participants rotate through various stations, earning points to win. No prior skills are needed, focusing on teamwork, quick thinking, and engagement.
fields.longDescription:
PLAYVERSE is a large-scale campus gaming event where students compete in teams by playing a variety of simple, fun, and engaging games.
The event features a mix of custom-built mini games developed by OSPC, along with classic and easy-to-play games that require no prior experience or gaming skills.

Each team rotates through multiple game stations, earning points based on performance.
At the end of all rounds, the team with the highest total score is declared the winner.

The event focuses on fun, teamwork, quick thinking, and engagement, making it accessible to students from all departments and years.

fields.shortDescription: Participants channel-hop through various film genres, performing short scenes to keep the audience engaged. This improvisational event requires actors to adapt quickly to different styles based on what the viewers want to stay tuned for.
fields.longDescription: Imagine an event where you flip through movie channels, catching snippets of different films, and pausing on the ones that catch your eye 👀. You could have a lineup of genres - action, rom-com, thriller, horror - and participants must act on which movie the audiences want to stay tuned for.

fields.shortDescription: Immerse yourself in a Japanese folklore escape room. Solve puzzles to uncover a cursed story. Eliminated players become spirits, influencing remaining participants with misdirection as the tragic narrative unfolds through hidden clues.
fields.longDescription:
The event is a Japanese folklore–inspired escape room presented as a story-driven mystery. Participants enter a dimly lit space where a cursed ghost story unfolds through a sequence of small, riddle-based games. Clues are hidden in simple objects such as plates, mirrors, and written fragments, with lighting used to shift mood and reveal information as the story progresses.

Players encounter in-game spirits and uncover pieces of a tragic narrative, gradually understanding the nature of the curse tied to the room. As the game advances, players are eliminated in stages. Eliminated players remain inside the experience as spirits, subtly influencing the remaining participants through misdirection, incomplete truths, or symbolic interaction.

fields.shortDescription: Join this creative event featuring caricature and anime sketching, "spin the wheel" dares, and pair painting. The fun concludes with an exciting Pictionary-style game where participants must sketch and guess words against the clock.
fields.longDescription: The event consists of many activities such as caricature and anime sketching followed by spin the wheel dare where one has to perform the dare specified in the wheel , then there is pair painting where in two individuals will be provided with  mini canvas to sketch or paint together and lastly we have a interesting game where one person would be given a word he/she has to sketch that within maybe 60 sec and the other has to guess it right . These are the activities that the club planning to conduct

fields.shortDescription: Join this creative event featuring caricature and anime sketching, "spin the wheel" dares, and pair painting. The fun concludes with an exciting Pictionary-style game where participants must sketch and guess words against the clock.
fields.longDescription: The event consists of many activities such as caricature and anime sketching followed by spin the wheel dare where one has to perform the dare specified in the wheel , then there is pair painting where in two individuals will be provided with  mini canvas to sketch or paint together and lastly we have a interesting game where one person would be given a word he/she has to sketch that within maybe 60 sec and the other has to guess it right . These are the activities that the club planning to conduct

fields.shortDescription: Teams compete in a classroom-based escape room to solve a sequence of puzzles within a strict time limit. This challenge tests logical reasoning and coordination as participants race to find the final key and exit before time runs out.
fields.longDescription: Emergency Exit 3.0 is a team-based escape room event conducted within a closed classroom environment. Participants compete in small teams, with multiple teams playing at the same time. The room contains a sequence of clues and puzzles that must be identified and solved to progress. Teams work within a fixed time limit to locate the final key or solution required to exit the room. The event follows a structured rule set and is designed around problem-solving, logical reasoning, and coordinated team effort.

fields.shortDescription: Midnight Protocol is a narrative-driven investigation where teams analyze evidence, decode clues, and question characters to solve a fictional crisis. Success depends on reasoning and accuracy across structured phases, offering a live thriller experience
fields.longDescription: Midnight Protocol is a narrative-driven investigation event conducted in structured phases. Participants register as teams and are briefed on a fictional crisis involving leaked information, missing data, and conflicting narratives. Teams receive evidence folders containing documents, transcripts, codes, and misleading leads. Over the next hour, they must analyze information, decode clues, question moderators acting as in-game characters, and make written decisions at fixed checkpoints. Each decision alters the difficulty and direction of subsequent tasks. The event is not speed-based; accuracy and reasoning matter more than rushing. Teams document their conclusions and submit final reports explaining their logic. The experience feels like being inside a live thriller, requiring sustained focus, collaboration, and critical thinking throughout.

fields.shortDescription: Campus Conspiracy is an immersive mystery where teams act as investigators to solve campus secrets. Teams explore locations, connect cryptic clues, and use reasoning to uncover the truth. The group with the most logical conclusion wins.
fields.longDescription:
Campus Conspiracy is an immersive, mystery-driven team event where participants are drawn into a strange situation unfolding somewhere on campus. Teams step into the role of investigators and are given limited information to begin with. From there, they explore different locations, interact with various sources, and uncover pieces of information as the story slowly reveals itself.

Nothing is straightforward. Some details help, others confuse, and not everything can be trusted. Teams must observe carefully, connect dots, and discuss their findings before jumping to conclusions. 

The challenge lies in how well participants think, reason, and work together under uncertainty. The team that best understands the situation and supports their conclusion with strong reasoning emerges as the winner, making the event intriguing, engaging, and full of suspense.

fields.shortDescription: DEBSOC presents a mystery event blending Riverdale pop culture with debate and deduction. Teams of two compete in rounds involving quick speaking, narrative analysis, and persuasive storytelling to solve morally grey crime briefs.
fields.longDescription:
Presented by VITSOL Debate Society (DEBSOC), Riverdale Reckonings is a thrilling mystery-driven cultural-academic event that blends pop-culture storytelling with debate, deduction, and quick thinking, straight out of the morally grey world of Riverdale. Participate in teams of two and compete across multiple exciting rounds:
1. One Minute at Pop’s: Speak for a minute on Riverdale-law-mystery topics without hesitation, repetition, or deviation.
2. The Blue & Gold Critique Panel: Watch a short Riverdale clip and break it down with sharp character, ethical, and narrative analysis.
3. Situation. Truth. Dare. — Riverdale Edition: Get a confidential crime-style brief and craft a convincing narrative to persuade the jury.

If you love drama, suspense, analysis, and mind games — welcome to Riverdale Reckonings.

fields.shortDescription: Quizzipedia, presented by VIT Chennai’s Quiz Club, is a fast-paced quiz dedicated to internet culture. From viral memes and Wikipedia rabbit holes to niche tech lore, it challenges digital citizens to showcase their knowledge of the online world’s most f
fields.longDescription:
Welcome to Quizzipedia, a quiz built for the modern internet explorer. This event dives into everything that makes the online world chaotic, funny, surprising and endlessly fascinating.

Expect questions inspired by viral moments, deep Wikipedia rabbit holes, forgotten fandom lore, brainrot memes, internet history, niche communities, tech culture and all the obscure trivia you only learn at 3 a.m. while scrolling. If the internet has touched it, confused it or obsessed over it, Quizzipedia will probably cover it.

The rounds are fast, unpredictable and packed with references that only true internet citizens will understand. Whether you live on Reddit, binge YouTube documentaries, fall into Wikipedia spirals, collect memes, or just know way too much random information, this quiz is designed for you.

Quizzipedia celebrates everything the internet has created, ruined or made weird.
Join in for a fun and chaotic trip across the digital universe.

Quizzipedia: The Internet Quiz
Presented by the Quiz Club of VIT Chennai.

fields.shortDescription: This detective-themed treasure hunt challenges teams to solve a campus crime by chasing clues and gathering evidence. By solving puzzles at various locations, participants narrow down suspects to identify the culprit in a race against others.
fields.longDescription: This event is a detective-themed treasure hunt where students work in teams to solve a crime by chasing clues across the college campus. Participants will move through different locations, collecting evidence and solving simple puzzles that lead them to the next clue. Each piece of evidence helps teams narrow down suspects by collecting more and more clues and get closer to identifying the culprit.

fields.shortDescription: This premier gaming fest celebrates digital competition and innovation through esports tournaments, console gaming, and virtual reality. It offers participants a platform to showcase talent, strategic thinking, and passion for gaming excellence.
fields.longDescription: This gaming fest is a premier event celebrating the spirit of digital competition and innovation. It features engaging esports tournaments, console gaming, and virtual reality experiences. Designed to challenge skills and foster camaraderie, the fest offers participants an opportunity to showcase talent, strategic thinking, and passion for gaming excellence.

fields.shortDescription: This unpredictable general knowledge quiz by VIT Chennai’s Quiz Club covers global news, tech, and pop culture. Participants face fast-paced rounds featuring history and viral trends, testing their quick reactions and broad knowledge in a high-energy, co
fields.longDescription:
Get ready for a quiz that pulls questions from every corner of the world and every corner of the internet. Everything, Everywhere, All at Once is a fast, fun and unpredictable general knowledge event that mixes international news, science, sports, pop culture, history, tech, entertainment and even a bit of hot gossip.

If it happened, trended, went viral, or made people talk, it might show up here. The rounds are designed to keep everyone on their toes, with a mix of serious questions, light moments and a few surprises to keep the energy high.

Whether you follow global affairs, binge movies, scroll through social media all day, or simply love random facts, this quiz has something for you. Bring your best thinking, your quickest reactions and a team that can keep up with the chaos.

Everything, Everywhere, All at Once
Presented by the Quiz Club of VIT Chennai.

fields.shortDescription: Teams navigate three rooms testing creativity, reflexes, and logic. From movie-themed puzzles to rapid-response tasks and a final logic battle, participants work together to identify weak points and secure victory under pressure.
fields.longDescription: The Multi-Themed Challenge Rooms event is a fast-paced, team-based competition designed to test creativity, logic, and performance under pressure. Room 1: Movie-Based Challenge Room engages participants with cinematic puzzles such as identifying films from background scores, guessing movies through character descriptions, silent acting, recognizing directors’ signature styles, and solving film-inspired crime cases. Teams must complete all challenges to unlock progression. Room 2: Reaction Time Challenge Room shifts focus to speed and reflexes through rapid-response tasks including color recognition, light or sound-based actions, hand-eye coordination, and instant command execution, where accuracy and timing are critical. Room 3: Boss Battle – Final Logic Strike serves as the high-stakes finale. Teams analyze structured clues to identify the boss’s exact weak point and execute a single irreversible verbal strike within strict time limits. One decision determines victory or elimination, emphasizing clarity, teamwork, and composure.

fields.shortDescription: Retrieve a stolen Dean File in the Shadow Cipher Protocol. Teams navigate campus, decoding cryptic messages, symbols, and false leads left by The Veiled Circle. Only the sharpest minds will solve the riddles and unlock the final seal.
fields.longDescription:
A top-secret Dean File has vanished from the college archives.
A covert group calling itself The Veiled Circle has scattered coded messages, symbolic clues, and misleading trails across the campus.
Nothing is direct.
Every clue is layered.
Every location is hidden behind riddles, shapes, and encrypted messages.

Your team must think like real investigators — decode ciphers, uncover symbolic pathways, break false clues, and uncover the truth.

Only the sharpest team will reach the final chamber, unlock the master seal, 
and retrieve the missing Dean File before time runs out.

Are you ready to enter the Shadow Cipher Protocol?

fields.shortDescription: Compete in the Grand Prix de La Francophonie, an F1 Esports event featuring legendary circuits. Racing solo or in duos, drivers must show precision and strategy to win rewards and set records in this elite sim-racing showdown.
fields.longDescription:
The Grand Prix de La Francophonie is a competitive F1 Esports event featuring iconic circuits from the French-speaking world. Drivers may compete solo or as duo teams, combining speed, precision, and strategy in a paddock-style format.
Participants choose one circuit to race:
🇫🇷 France – Paul Ricard: High-speed layout demanding clean lines and braking precision.
🇨🇦 Canada – Gilles Villeneuve: Fast, technical, and unforgiving with heavy braking zones.
🇧🇪 Belgium – Spa-Francorchamps: Historic, flowing circuit testing courage and control.
🇲🇨 Monaco – Circuit de Monaco: Ultra-technical street circuit with zero margin for error.
Duo teams represent a single entry among 10 teams in the paddock, emphasizing coordination and shared performance.
Exclusive rewards will be awarded to podium finishers and track time record holders.
The event showcases elite sim-racing skill across some of motorsport’s most legendary circuits.

fields.shortDescription: The Crowd Says is a team event where participants guess the most popular responses to relatable questions about college life and pop culture. It rewards those who can think like the majority, fostering a fun, energetic, and light-hearted atmosphere.
fields.longDescription: The Crowd Says is an engaging, team-based informal event designed to test how well participants can think like the majority. Instead of focusing on correct or factual answers, the event challenges teams to guess the most popular responses that people are likely to give to a question. The questions are fun, relatable, and centered around college life, daily habits, pop culture, and common social situations, making it easy for students to connect and participate enthusiastically. Each team is given a limited time to discuss and present their answers, earning points based on how popular their responses are. The event encourages teamwork, quick thinking, and spontaneous decision-making, while also keeping the atmosphere light-hearted and entertaining. With active audience involvement, humorous moments, and friendly competition, The Crowd Says creates an energetic environment that appeals to both participants and spectators. It is an ideal event to bring students together and add excitement to the cultural lineup.

fields.shortDescription: Join a light painting workshop starting at 1:00 PM. Learn long-exposure techniques and use vibrant light sticks to create art. Participants take home a personalized photo and the skills to produce beautiful light-based imagery.
fields.longDescription:
The event kicks off at 1:00 PM with an introduction to the art of Light Painting Photography, where they’ll have a session to learn camera settings, light tools, and long-exposure techniques. 
Various kinds of techniques will be taught using vibrant and multicolored light sticks and some live demonstrations will be shown too. After the session, at 2:00 PM, participants will head over to take their very own personalized light painted pictures, featuring any stylized shape they want. They’ll walk away with a photo of their own, and the knowledge to make beautiful light paintings.

fields.shortDescription: In this multiplayer game mode, teams protect their beds while attempting to destroy their opponents'. As long as a bed remains, players can respawn. Success requires gathering resources and building bridges to defeat the last surviving team.
fields.longDescription: Minecraft BedWars is a multiplayer game mode where teams compete to protect their bed while trying to destroy opponents’ beds. As long as a team’s bed remains intact, players can respawn. Teams gather resources, upgrade gear, and build bridges to attack enemies. The last team standing wins.

fields.shortDescription: Arcade Arena transforms a room into a lively zone for classic and modern board games. Engage in strategy, teamwork, and friendly competition through timed challenges. It is the perfect screen-free way to connect and win prizes.
fields.longDescription:
Arcade Arena is an engaging board game arcade room event designed to bring people together through strategy, teamwork, and fun. The space will be transformed into a lively gaming zone featuring a variety of classic and modern board games, ranging from quick party games to deep strategy-based challenges. Participants can choose their favorite games, form teams, or compete one-on-one in a friendly and welcoming environment.

The event encourages social interaction, logical thinking, and healthy competition while providing a refreshing break from digital screens. Special rounds, timed challenges, and mini-tournaments will add excitement and keep the energy high throughout the event. Prizes and recognition await top performers, making every game more thrilling.

Whether you are a board game enthusiast or a casual player, Arcade Arena offers the perfect platform to unwind, connect, and enjoy the timeless joy of board games. Roll the dice, plan your moves, and experience the fun of Arcade Arena.

fields.shortDescription: Join Render X, a hands-on Blender workshop focusing on 3D modeling, texturing, and lighting. Ideal for beginners, this session guides participants through creating objects and realistic renders, providing a strong foundation in design.
fields.longDescription:
Render X is a hands-on Blender workshop designed to introduce participants to the fundamentals of 3D modeling, texturing, lighting, and rendering. The session aims to provide a clear and practical understanding of Blender’s interface and essential tools, making it suitable for both beginners and those with basic experience in 3D design.

Participants will be guided step by step through the process of creating simple 3D objects and transforming them into visually appealing renders. The workshop will also cover key concepts such as camera setup, material application, and lighting techniques to enhance realism and visual quality. Emphasis will be placed on practical learning, enabling attendees to apply their skills to future projects with confidence.

Render X offers a supportive and interactive learning environment where participants can ask questions, experiment freely, and gain hands-on experience. By the end of the workshop, attendees will have a strong foundation in Blender and a rendered output they can showcase or build upon.

fields.eventName: The Case Files – A Murder Mystery Challenge
fields.shortDescription: The Case Files is an interactive murder mystery where teams act as investigators. Analyze evidence like letters and clippings to uncover motives and timelines. Solve the crime through logic and teamwork to find the culprit and win.
fields.longDescription:
Overview:
The Case Files is an interactive murder-mystery event where teams act as investigative units tasked with solving a fictional crime. Each team receives a detailed case folder containing letters, newspaper clippings, journal entries, objects, and other evidence fragments.

Mechanics:
Teams analyze every document to uncover connections, motives, timelines, and inconsistencies.

As they propose deductions or answer key questions, they unlock additional evidence files that reveal deeper layers of the case.

Progress depends entirely on the accuracy of their deductions, encouraging careful reasoning and teamwork.

Objective:
Teams must reconstruct what happened, identify the culprit, and provide a coherent explanation of the crime based on the evidence trail. The team with the most accurate and complete deduction wins.

fields.shortDescription: Celebrate India's rich heritage at the Classical Dance Showcase. Performers from various colleges will display grace and tradition in this elegant cultural celebration of movement and artistry.
fields.longDescription: Celebrate the rich heritage of India at the Classical Dance Showcase! Performers from across colleges will mesmerize with displays of grace and tradition. Don't miss this celebration of elegance and culture!

fields.shortDescription: Teams compete in a food-themed murder mystery, solving puzzles hidden in recipes and ingredients. Participants prepare dishes to reveal clues about a chef's elimination. The fastest team to identify the killer and finish their meal wins.
fields.longDescription:
It is an immersive, food-themed murder mystery event where cooking meets crime-solving. The event is set in a fictional kitchen where a famous chef has been mysteriously “eliminated,” and the only clues left behind are hidden within recipes, ingredients, and cooking techniques. Participants are divided into teams, each representing suspects who were present during the incident.

Each team is given a mystery recipe box containing ingredients, recipe cards, and secret clues. While preparing the dish, teams must analyze food-related hints, decode culinary riddles, and piece together the sequence of events leading to the crime. Every cooking task completed correctly reveals new evidence or twists in the story.

Teams must balance speed, accuracy, and deduction, as incorrect cooking choices may lead to misleading clues. Judges act as investigators, interacting with teams and introducing surprise plot turns. The team that successfully completes the dish and correctly identifies the murderer, motive, and method wins the event.

This event encourages teamwork, creativity, time management, and critical thinking, making it a perfect blend of entertainment and challenge.

fields.shortDescription: Style-A-Thon is a fashion contest where teams of stylists, models, and photographers interpret a theme on the runway. Evaluation is based on styling, stage presence, and thematic relevance, celebrating creativity and collaborative storytelling.
fields.longDescription: Style-A-Thon, organized by the Designers Club of VIT Chennai, is a dynamic fashion show competition that celebrates creativity, collaboration, and storytelling through style. Teams comprising stylists, models, and photographers work together to conceptualize outfits, present them on the runway, and capture striking visuals. For each edition of the event, a specific theme is structured and provided to all participating teams, which they are required to interpret, embrace, and showcase through their clothing designs, styling choices, and runway presentation. The event evaluates participants on styling, stage presence, ramp walk, thematic relevance, and visual presentation, along with audience engagement on social media. Held exclusively during Vibrance for the past four editions, Style-A-Thon has grown into one of the most celebrated and anticipated events of the fest. It offers a platform for students to push creative boundaries, experiment with innovative silhouettes and textures, and translate abstract concepts into compelling fashion narratives. With structured rehearsals, professional evaluation, and an energetic runway experience, the event stands as a flagship fashion showcase on campus.

fields.shortDescription: This duo dance event invites pairs to perform pre-choreographed routines, showcasing creativity, synchronization, and artistic chemistry. Dancers from all backgrounds are welcome to display their technical skill and talent.
fields.longDescription: This duo dance event invites pairs to come together and showcase their pre-choreographed routines, blending creativity, synchronization, and expressive performance. It’s an opportunity for participants to demonstrate their chemistry as a duo, combining technical skill with artistry to captivate the audience. With dancers from all backgrounds welcome, the event promises an exciting celebration of teamwork and talent.

fields.shortDescription: This dynamic dance competition features a video screening round followed by a live on-stage finale. Teams will showcase their creativity, coordination, and stage presence while celebrating the power of artistic expression.
fields.longDescription: This event is a dynamic dance competition where teams first showcase their skills through a video submission, highlighting their creativity and coordination. The top-performing teams from the video screening will then advance to the on-stage finale, where they will perform live in front of an audience. The event celebrates the power of teamwork, artistic expression, and performance, offering teams a platform to display their hard work, creativity, and stage presence.

fields.shortDescription: The Hotseat is a dynamic multi-stage competition testing knowledge and wit. From rapid-fire questions to a lively Family Feud round and a climactic KBC-style finale, teams must demonstrate teamwork, speed, and strategy to emerge victorious.
fields.longDescription:
The Hotseat is a dynamic flagship event that tests knowledge, wit, and debating skills in a high-energy, multi-stage competition. The event kicks off with the Speed Zone, where teams of two tackle a rapid-fire pen-and-paper round, answering as many questions as possible within a set time. This round challenges participants’ quick thinking and accuracy, setting the tone for the competition. The top teams then move on to the Family Feud, a lively and interactive round where teams guess the most popular answers to survey-style questions, earning points based on audience-approved responses. This round emphasizes teamwork, strategy, and quick thinking, while keeping the energy fun and engaging.

The intensity escalates as the final five teams earn the chance to compete in a live KBC-style round, featuring buzzer-based questions, audience participation, and strategic gameplay. It is a hybrid quiz-debate event that combines suspense, knowledge and creativity.

fields.shortDescription: Palette Roulette is a solo art contest using random mediums from a mystery box and an instrument image. Artists must create original work for the theme “Live the Beats,” meaningfully integrating the instrument into their final piece.
fields.longDescription:
“Palette Roulette” is a solo sketching and painting competition where each participant will receive a mystery box at the beginning of the event. The mystery box will contain a random set of colouring and sketching mediums, such as graphite pencils, colour pencils, acrylic paints, charcoal, etc., along with an image of a musical instrument.
Participants are required to create an original artwork that revolves around the musical instrument provided, ensuring its meaningful inclusion in the final composition. The artwork should interpret the theme “Live the Beats”.

fields.shortDescription: Battle Arena is a solo freestyle dance competition by VIT Chennai. Performers engage in high-energy, head-to-head battles, relying on raw skill, rhythm, and spontaneous movement without any pre-planned choreography.
fields.longDescription: The Dance Club of VIT Chennai presents Battle Arena, an intense solo freestyle dance competition designed to test creativity, rhythm, adaptability, and stage presence. Participants will engage in high-energy, head-to-head dance battles where spontaneous movement and raw skill determine the winner. There is no choreography and no second chances—only pure talent on display.

fields.shortDescription: Show off your moves and creativity in the Western Solo Dance Competition. Participants have two to three minutes to shine on stage while competing against the best dancers for victory and recognition.
fields.longDescription: Unleash your moves in our Western Solo Dance Competition! With 2-3 minutes to shine, show off your skills and creativity while competing against the best.

fields.shortDescription: UNLOCK-AI is an immersive escape room experience where teams solve puzzles based on AI ethics and logic to stop a rogue system. This high-tension challenge emphasizes teamwork and quick thinking while teaching participants about AI concepts.
fields.longDescription:
UNLOCK-AI is an immersive AI escape experience where teams race to stop a rogue system before it takes control.
Participants solve fast-paced puzzles based on real AI, ethics, and logic concepts.
High tension, teamwork, and learning—packed into one thrilling experience along with fun twists at each level.

fields.shortDescription: Fuyumatsuri is an anime festival featuring a stage competition and interactive stalls. Participants enjoy games, quizzes, and Beyblade battles. The event celebrates Japanese pop culture and provides a creative space for community expression.
fields.longDescription: Fuyumatsuri is a one-day anime and cosplay festival conducted by Anime Realm as part of Vibrance, celebrating Japanese pop culture, creativity, and community on campus. The flagship event is a cosplay competition where participants come on stage, introduce their characters, and perform in character, with winners decided through a combination of judges’ scores and audience response. Alongside the stage events, the venue will host 10 or more unique anime-themed stalls featuring games, quizzes, art, interactive experiences, and mini-tournaments such as Beyblade battles and an anime drawing competition, ensuring continuous engagement throughout the day. The event aims to provide a safe and inclusive space for self-expression, encourage student collaboration across departments, and create memorable experiences for both seasoned anime fans and newcomers. Building on the success and strong participation of last year’s edition, this iteration of Fuyumatsuri seeks to be bigger, more interactive, and even more vibrant.

fields.longDescription:

Participants solve fast-paced puzzles based on real AI, ethics, and logic concepts.
High tension, teamwork, and learning—packed into one thrilling experience along with fun twists at each level.

fields.shortDescription: Dancing Drama blends storytelling and movement in a group dance contest. Teams depict social themes through choreography. It focuses on narrative flow, using rhythm to bring powerful real-life scenarios and stories to life on stage.
fields.longDescription: Dancing Drama is an internal group dance competition that blends storytelling with movement. Each team will present a concept-based performance where narrative, expression, and choreography come together to depict a theme or storyline. The event encourages creativity, character portrayal, teamwork, and the ability to communicate emotions through dance. With a focus on dramatic expression and narrative flow, the stage becomes a canvas where teams bring stories and real life scenarios and depictions (eg: Poverty, Transgender Rights) to life through rhythm, formation, synchronization, and performance depth.

fields.shortDescription: The Campus Photo Contest invites participants to capture campus life through photography. Selected entries are posted on social media, where winners are decided by online voting. It offers a platform for students to showcase their creative vision.
fields.longDescription:
The Campus Photo Contest is a fun and creative event where participants capture photos only inside the college campus. The aim is to showcase campus life, nature, and creativity through photography.
All selected photos will be posted on the official social media page, and winners will be decided based on online voting (likes). Let your creativity speak through your lens!

fields.shortDescription: In this online event, teams use AI tools to create original short films based on prompts. Covering everything from plot to voiceovers, participants compete for awards, culminating in a big-screen premiere and audience voting session.
fields.longDescription:
Online Event - Promptwood Pictures is a fast-paced, laugh-friendly film-making event where teams create an original short movie (15 - 30 minutes) entirely using AI video generation tools (like Google Veo and similar platforms). From story idea to final cut, everything is driven by prompts: plot, characters, scenes, camera moves, voiceovers, sound, and even the poster. Participants will compete to turn wild concepts into watchable (and meme-worthy) films under a fixed time limit, learning the art of prompt engineering, visual storytelling, and creative iteration along the way.

Expect unexpected plot twists, surreal shots, and “how did the AI think of that?” moments. At the end, all films premiere on the big screen, followed by audience voting and jury awards—Best Story, Best Comedy, Best VFX, Best Twist, and the legendary “Most Chaotic Prompt.”

Bring your imagination; we’ll bring the pixels.

fields.shortDescription: This IPL Auction event starts with a cricket quiz to shortlist participants. Teams then use a virtual budget to bid on players, mimicking the real IPL. The event concludes by announcing the owners with the most strategic squad selections.
fields.longDescription: The IPL Auction event will begin with registration of all participants, followed by a short cricket quiz to test knowledge and shortlist the top 40 contenders. From these, 10 team owners will be selected, and each owner will form a 4-member team. Once teams are finalized, the main auction will begin where each team, with a fixed virtual budget, bids on players from different categories to build their squad, just like in the real IPL auction. The auctioneer will announce players, manage bids, and track team budgets until all squads are complete. The event will conclude with announcing the best team selections.

fields.shortDescription: Arignar Anna Tamil Mandram invites cinephiles to a Kollywood-themed event. Test your expertise by decoding movies from images and memes in a series of fun, mind-bending rounds designed for ultimate entertainment.
fields.longDescription:
Decode movies from images
Find famous dialogues from memes

It’s an exciting opportunity for all the cinephiles to showcase their Kollywood knowledge expertise. An amazing set of rounds blended with more fun, entertainment, and mind-bending challenges hosted by Arignar Anna Tamil Mandram.

fields.shortDescription: Sol Vilaiyatu is an engaging word game event designed to sharpen vocabulary and reasoning. Teams of two to three compete in rounds of clue-based guessing and unscrambling jumbled words, fostering teamwork and logical thinking skills.
fields.longDescription: Sol Vilaiyatu is a word game event designed to enhance vocabulary, reasoning, and teamwork. Teams of 2–3 members will participate in two rounds: one involves guessing a word from clues, and the other involves unscrambling a jumbled word. This event helps students sharpen their language skills and logical thinking.

fields.shortDescription: Sol Vilaiyatu is an engaging word game event designed to sharpen vocabulary and reasoning. Teams of two to three compete in rounds of clue-based guessing and unscrambling jumbled words, fostering teamwork and logical thinking skills.
fields.longDescription: Sol Vilaiyatu is a word game event designed to enhance vocabulary, reasoning, and teamwork. Teams of 2–3 members will participate in two rounds: one involves guessing a word from clues, and the other involves unscrambling a jumbled word. This event helps students sharpen their language skills and logical thinking.
